source_sentences: Siso's depictions of land, water center new gallery exhibition
"People Swimming in the Swimming Pool" from 2022 is one Vicente Siso artwork that will display at Tierra del Sol Gallery beginning Jan. 13. (photo courtesy of Vicente Siso)

Tierra del Sol is pleased to present "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" at the new gallery location in West Hollywood. Siso has been an artist in the Studio Arts Program since 2012, this marks his debut solo exhibition. Siso was born 1962 in Madrid and raised between Venezuela, Trinidad and Miami; he moved with his family to Southern California in his early 20s.
target_sentences: 西索描绘陆与水的画作成为新画廊展览的焦点
2022 年创作的《泳池戏水》是维森特·西索的一幅作品，将于 1 月 13 日起在 Tierra del Sol 画廊展出。（图片由维森特·西索提供）
Tierra del Sol 画廊荣幸地在西好莱坞的新址推出“维森特·西索：水与陆的记忆”展览。西索自 2012 年起成为“工作室艺术项目”的艺术家，本次展览是他的首次个展。西索 1962 年出生于马德里，童年在委内瑞拉、特立尼达和迈阿密之间辗转，20 岁出头时随家人移居南加州。

Siso 对土地和水的描绘成为新画廊展览的中心
2022 年的作品《在游泳池中游泳的人》是维森特·西索 (Vicente Siso) 的一件作品，将于 1 月 13 日起在 Tierra del Sol 画廊展出。（照片由 Vicente Siso 提供）
Tierra del Sol 画廊很高兴在西好莱坞的新画廊地点推出展览“维森特·西索：土地与水的记忆”。自 2012 年以来，Siso 一直是工作室艺术项目的艺术家，此次展览标志着他的首次个人展览。Siso 于 1962 年出生于马德里，在委内瑞拉、特立尼达和迈阿密之间长大；他在二十出头时随家人搬到南加州。

source_sentences: Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.
The Tierra del Sol Gallery is located at 7414 Santa Monica Blvd. For information, visit tierradelsolgallery.org.
target_sentences: 西索熟练掌握各种题材，创作了大量风景画、肖像画和静物画作品，并运用丙烯、蜡笔、铅笔或水彩等多种媒介进行创作。他的作品灵感来源于家庭肖像、参考照片和个人回忆，丰富多彩的构图展现了他广泛的兴趣和跨媒介的创作能力。西索的热带风景画和海景画反映了他过去生活地区的地理风貌，作品中的人物与丰富的图案相互交织，在文化、记忆和环境之间建立起了一种有意义的联系。西索的作品名称混杂了西班牙语和英语，体现了他丰富多彩而又错综复杂的洛杉矶生活。《维森特·西索：水与陆的记忆》将于 1 月 13 日（周六）开幕，开幕酒会时间为晚上 6 点至 8 点。展览将持续至 3 月 3 日（周日）。
Tierra del Sol 画廊位于圣莫尼卡大道 7414 号。更多信息请访问 tierradelsolgallery.org。
source_text:
Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.
The Tierra del Sol Gallery is located at 7414 Santa Monica Blvd. For information, visit tierradelsolgallery.org.

reference_text:
西索熟练掌握各种题材，创作了大量风景画、肖像画和静物画作品，并运用丙烯、蜡笔、铅笔或水彩等多种媒介进行创作。他的作品灵感来源于家庭肖像、参考照片和个人回忆，丰富多彩的构图展现了他广泛的兴趣和跨媒介的创作能力。西索的热带风景画和海景画反映了他过去生活地区的地理风貌，作品中的人物与丰富的图案相互交织，在文化、记忆和环境之间建立起了一种有意义的联系。西索的作品名称混杂了西班牙语和英语，体现了他丰富多彩而又错综复杂的洛杉矶生活。《维森特·西索：水与陆的记忆》将于 1 月 13 日（周六）开幕，开幕酒会时间为晚上 6 点至 8 点。展览将持续至 3 月 3 日（周日）。
Tierra del Sol 画廊位于圣莫尼卡大道 7414 号。更多信息请访问 tierradelsolgallery.org。
hypo_1:
Siso精通多种题材，创作出大量风景画、人物画和静物画作品，使用媒介包括丙烯、粉彩、铅笔或水彩。他从家庭肖像、自己的参考照片和记忆中汲取灵感，色彩丰富的构图展现了他跨媒介的广泛兴趣和高超技艺。Siso的热带风景和海景反映了他过往的地理经历，运用丰富的图案并融入人物，建立起文化、记忆与环境之间有意义的联系。Siso用西班牙语和英语混合为他的艺术作品命名，象征着他在洛杉矶县生活中备受赞誉且不可或缺的复杂性。“维森特·西索：土地与水的记忆”展览将于1月13日星期六开幕，下午6点至8点举行开幕式。展览将持续到3月3日星期日。
Tierra del Sol画廊位于Santa Monica Blvd. 7414号。更多信息请访问tierradelsolgallery.org。

hypo_2:
Siso在多种题材上都展现出卓越的造诣，创作出大量风景、人物和静物作品，使用的媒介包括丙烯、粉彩、铅笔和水彩。他从家庭肖像、自己拍摄的参考照片以及记忆中汲取灵感，色彩斑斓的构图充分体现了他在不同媒介上的广泛兴趣和精湛技艺。Siso的热带风景和海景作品反映了他过往的地理经历，通过丰富的图案和人物的融入，建立起文化、记忆与环境之间有意义的联系。Siso用西班牙语和英语混合命名他的作品，象征着他在洛杉矶县生活中复杂而重要的身份。“维森特·西索：土地与水的记忆”展览将于1月13日星期六开幕，下午6点至8点举行开幕酒会。展览将持续到3月3日星期日。
Tierra del Sol画廊位于圣莫尼卡大道7414号。更多信息请访问tierradelsolgallery.org。

source_sentences: Adapt the old, accommodate the new to solve issue

At the precinct level, we just need to look at the Sydney CBD as an example of an area which has grown from its pre-settlement landscape into a two-storey city, from a maximum height of 150 feet to the soaring towers of today. At a much scaled-down level, the same can occur across Sydney's town centres located around transport nodes. Inner suburbs must also evolve, with a swing to more affordable apartment living at heights below the tree tops on key sites. Of course, the new growth in housing needs to be well-designed and trees, landscaping and parks need to be included along with other essential infrastructure.
target_sentences: 改造旧居所，容纳新移民，解决居住问题
在区域层面，我们只需要以悉尼中央商务区为例。这个地区一路走来，从原生地貌到两层民居，再从最高不过150英尺的建筑，到如今高耸入云的摩天楼。在更小的尺度上，交通枢纽周边的悉尼市区各中心也可能遵循同样的发展路径。近郊也必须发展起来，在关键地段建设低于树顶高度、更经济适用的公寓楼。当然，新开发的住房需要精心设计，综合考量树木、景观、公园以及其他必要的基础设施。
source_text:
Adapt the old, accommodate the new to solve issue
At the precinct level, we just need to look at the Sydney CBD as an example of an area which has grown from its pre-settlement landscape into a two-storey city, from a maximum height of 150 feet to the soaring towers of today. At a much scaled-down level, the same can occur across Sydney's town centres located around transport nodes. Inner suburbs must also evolve, with a swing to more affordable apartment living at heights below the tree tops on key sites. Of course, the new growth in housing needs to be well-designed and trees, landscaping and parks need to be included along with other essential infrastructure.
target_text: 改造旧居所，容纳新移民，解决居住问题 在区域层面，我们只需要以悉尼中央商务区为例。这个地区一路走来，从原生地貌到两层民居，再从最高不过150英尺的建筑，到如今高耸入云的摩天楼。在更小的尺度上，交通枢纽周边的悉尼市区各中心也可能遵循同样的发展路径。近郊也必须发展起来，在关键地段建设低于树顶高度、更经济适用的公寓楼。当然，新开发的住房需要精心设计，综合考量树木、景观、公园以及其他必要的基础设施。
reference_text:
改造旧居所，容纳新移民，解决居住问题
在区域层面，我们只需要以悉尼中央商务区为例。这个地区一路走来，从原生地貌到两层民居，再从最高不过150英尺的建筑，到如今高耸入云的摩天楼。在更小的尺度上，交通枢纽周边的悉尼市区各中心也可能遵循同样的发展路径。近郊也必须发展起来，在关键地段建设低于树顶高度、更经济适用的公寓楼。当然，新开发的住房需要精心设计，综合考量树木、景观、公园以及其他必要的基础设施。
hypo_1:
适应旧有，融合新变以解决问题
在基层层面，我们只需以悉尼中央商务区为例，它就是一个从早期定居地景观发展为两层楼高的城市区域，建筑高度从最高150英尺发展到如今高耸的摩天大楼。在规模缩小许多的情况下，悉尼围绕交通枢纽的城镇中心同样可以实现类似的发展。内城区也必须进行演变，在关键场地上，应转向在树冠之下建设更具可负担性的公寓住宅。当然，新的住房增长必须设计良好，并且需要包括树木、绿化和公园，以及其他必要的基础设施。

在基层层面，我们只需以悉尼中央商务区为例，它就是一个从早期定居地景观发展为两层楼高的城市区域，建筑高度从最高150英尺发展到如今高耸入云的摩天大楼。在规模缩小许多的情况下，悉尼围绕交通枢纽的城镇中心同样可以实现类似的发展。内城区也必须进行演变，在关键场地上，应转向在树冠之下建设更具可负担性的公寓住宅。当然，新的住房增长必须设计精良，并且应包括树木、绿化和公园，以及其他必要的基础设施。

source_sentences: Our planning system also needs to adapt so that planners in suburban councils, who seem to be less supportive of change, are not the only determinants of the future shape of their suburbs. A way forward could be to have an independent decision-making body that championed quality design as long as it fitted below the tree tops and incorporated family living, large balconies, common gardens and presented a friendly appearance. This could be a role for the current NSW government architect working within a carefully crafted complying code.
target_sentences: 我们的规划体系也需要调整，使郊区市政委员会的规划者（他们似乎不太支持变革）不再一手把持郊区未来形态的话语权。未来的方向可能是建立独立的决策机构来大力倡导优质设计：高度在树顶以下，融入家庭生活设施、大阳台、公共花园和友好外观。这也许是目前新南威尔士州政府的建筑专家在精心制定的合规规范中能够发挥的作用。
source_text: Our planning system also needs to adapt so that planners in suburban councils, who seem to be less supportive of change, are not the only determinants of the future shape of their suburbs. A way forward could be to have an independent decision-making body that championed quality design as long as it fitted below the tree tops and incorporated family living, large balconies, common gardens and presented a friendly appearance. This could be a role for the current NSW government architect working within a carefully crafted complying code.
target_text: 我们的规划体系也需要调整，使郊区市政委员会的规划者（他们似乎不太支持变革）不再一手把持郊区未来形态的话语权。未来的方向可能是建立独立的决策机构来大力倡导优质设计：高度在树顶以下，融入家庭生活设施、大阳台、公共花园和友好外观。这也许是目前新南威尔士州政府的建筑专家在精心制定的合规规范中能够发挥的作用。
reference_text: 我们的规划体系也需要调整，使郊区市政委员会的规划者（他们似乎不太支持变革）不再一手把持郊区未来形态的话语权。未来的方向可能是建立独立的决策机构来大力倡导优质设计：高度在树顶以下，融入家庭生活设施、大阳台、公共花园和友好外观。这也许是目前新南威尔士州政府的建筑专家在精心制定的合规规范中能够发挥的作用。
hypo_1: 我们的规划系统也需要进行调整，以确保郊区委员会的规划人员不会成为未来郊区形态的唯一决定因素，因为这些人似乎对变革的支持度较低。前进的方向可以是设立一个独立的决策机构，只要设计质量符合树冠以下的标准，并融入家庭生活、宽敞的阳台、公共花园并呈现出友好的外观，该机构就应积极倡导优质设计。这可能是新南威尔士州现任政府建筑师在精心制定的合规性法规框架内所应承担的角色。

source_sentences: Over the past decade, our lives have changed through technology, with many working from home, and Sydney has gained an impressive network of metro and light rail systems. Our ability to purchase online has changed the way we shop, and friends and family seem closer because of smartphone communication. All of these adaptations from one system to another can also occur in our built environment through a planning focus on adaptive reuse rather than preferencing heritage preservation.
Chris Johnson is a former NSW government architect (1995-2005) and executive director, NSW Department of Planning (2005-2009). He was CEO of Urban Taskforce Australia between 2011 and 2019.
target_sentences: 在过去的十年里，科技改变了我们的生活，许多人开始在家工作，悉尼也建成了令人印象深刻的地铁和轻轨网络。网购改变了我们的购物方式，智能手机的普及也拉近了朋友和家人之间的距离。同样地，如果城市规划的重点放在建筑的活化再利用上，而不是一味优先考虑老建筑保护，我们业已成型的环境也可以实现这样的转变和适应，实现系统层面的变革。
克里斯·约翰逊曾任新南威尔士州政府建筑专家（1995-2005 年）和新南威尔士州规划部执行主任（2005-2009 年）。2011 年至 2019 年，他曾担任澳大利亚城市特别工作组的首席执行官。
source_text:
Over the past decade, our lives have changed through technology, with many working from home, and Sydney has gained an impressive network of metro and light rail systems. Our ability to purchase online has changed the way we shop, and friends and family seem closer because of smartphone communication. All of these adaptations from one system to another can also occur in our built environment through a planning focus on adaptive reuse rather than preferencing heritage preservation.
Chris Johnson is a former NSW government architect (1995-2005) and executive director, NSW Department of Planning (2005-2009). He was CEO of Urban Taskforce Australia between 2011 and 2019.
target_text: 在过去的十年里，科技改变了我们的生活，许多人开始在家工作，悉尼也建成了令人印象深刻的地铁和轻轨网络。网购改变了我们的购物方式，智能手机的普及也拉近了朋友和家人之间的距离。同样地，如果城市规划的重点放在建筑的活化再利用上，而不是一味优先考虑老建筑保护，我们业已成型的环境也可以实现这样的转变和适应，实现系统层面的变革。 克里斯·约翰逊曾任新南威尔士州政府建筑专家（1995-2005 年）和新南威尔士州规划部执行主任（2005-2009 年）。2011 年至 2019 年，他曾担任澳大利亚城市特别工作组的首席执行官。
reference_text:
在过去的十年里，科技改变了我们的生活，许多人开始在家工作，悉尼也建成了令人印象深刻的地铁和轻轨网络。网购改变了我们的购物方式，智能手机的普及也拉近了朋友和家人之间的距离。同样地，如果城市规划的重点放在建筑的活化再利用上，而不是一味优先考虑老建筑保护，我们业已成型的环境也可以实现这样的转变和适应，实现系统层面的变革。
克里斯·约翰逊曾任新南威尔士州政府建筑专家（1995-2005 年）和新南威尔士州规划部执行主任（2005-2009 年）。2011 年至 2019 年，他曾担任澳大利亚城市特别工作组的首席执行官。
hypo_1:
在过去的十年中，我们的生活因科技而发生了变化，许多人开始在家工作，悉尼也建立起了令人印象深刻的地铁和轻轨系统网络。我们通过在线购物的能力改变了我们的购物方式，而由于智能手机的沟通，朋友和家人似乎更亲近了。所有这些从一个系统到另一个系统的适应，也可以通过规划重点放在适应性再利用而不是优先考虑遗产保护而在我们的人造环境中实现。

source_sentences: A final push for female equality
Last year, the World Economic Forum forecast that it would take five generations to achieve gender equality in every nation. Now the World Bank wants to rapidly accelerate that time frame.

The international financial institution is poised to launch a strategy aimed at significantly advancing the rights and economic opportunities for girls and women by 2030. The plan focuses on improving inclusivity and resilience through access to finance, technological innovation, and changes in public policy and law.

"Recent research demonstrates that both social norms and mindsets can change, for example, that engaging men and boys can foster their support and buy-in for gender equality," a consultative draft of the plan states. "Positive gender outcomes can be accelerated and scaled with a better understanding of ... how social norms and mindsets shape everyday expectations, priorities, and practices."
target_sentences: 为女性平等奋力一搏
去年，世界经济论坛预测，全球实现性别平等需要五代人的时间。现在，世界银行希望迅速加快这一进程。
这家国际金融机构准备推出一项战略，旨在到 2030 年大幅提升女童和妇女的权利和经济机会。该计划的重点是通过资金支持、技术创新以及公共政策和法律变革，提高包容性和韧性。
“最近的研究表明，社会规范和思维方式都可以改变，例如，让成年和未成年的男性参与进来，可以培养他们对性别平等的支持和认同，”该计划的一份咨询草案指出，“如果能更好地了解社会规范和思维方式如何塑造日常期望、优先事项和行为方式，就能加快实现和扩大积极的性别平等成果。”
source_text:
A final push for female equality
Last year, the World Economic Forum forecast that it would take five generations to achieve gender equality in every nation. Now the World Bank wants to rapidly accelerate that time frame.
The international financial institution is poised to launch a strategy aimed at significantly advancing the rights and economic opportunities for girls and women by 2030. The plan focuses on improving inclusivity and resilience through access to finance, technological innovation, and changes in public policy and law.
"Recent research demonstrates that both social norms and mindsets can change, for example, that engaging men and boys can foster their support and buy-in for gender equality," a consultative draft of the plan states. "Positive gender outcomes can be accelerated and scaled with a better understanding of ... how social norms and mindsets shape everyday expectations, priorities, and practices."
target_text: 为女性平等奋力一搏 去年，世界经济论坛预测，全球实现性别平等需要五代人的时间。现在，世界银行希望迅速加快这一进程。 这家国际金融机构准备推出一项战略，旨在到 2030 年大幅提升女童和妇女的权利和经济机会。该计划的重点是通过资金支持、技术创新以及公共政策和法律变革，提高包容性和韧性。 “最近的研究表明，社会规范和思维方式都可以改变，例如，让成年和未成年的男性参与进来，可以培养他们对性别平等的支持和认同，”该计划的一份咨询草案指出，“如果能更好地了解社会规范和思维方式如何塑造日常期望、优先事项和行为方式，就能加快实现和扩大积极的性别平等成果。”
reference_text:
为女性平等奋力一搏
去年，世界经济论坛预测，全球实现性别平等需要五代人的时间。现在，世界银行希望迅速加快这一进程。
这家国际金融机构准备推出一项战略，旨在到 2030 年大幅提升女童和妇女的权利和经济机会。该计划的重点是通过资金支持、技术创新以及公共政策和法律变革，提高包容性和韧性。
“最近的研究表明，社会规范和思维方式都可以改变，例如，让成年和未成年的男性参与进来，可以培养他们对性别平等的支持和认同，”该计划的一份咨询草案指出，“如果能更好地了解社会规范和思维方式如何塑造日常期望、优先事项和行为方式，就能加快实现和扩大积极的性别平等成果。”
hypo_1:
为实现女性平等的最后冲刺
去年，世界经济论坛预测，要在每个国家实现性别平等需要五代人的时间。现在，世界银行希望迅速加快这一时间表。
这家国际金融机构正准备推出一项战略，旨在到2030年显著推进女孩和妇女的权利和经济机会。该计划的重点是通过获得金融服务、技术创新以及公共政策和法律的变革，提高包容性和抗风险能力。
该计划的咨询草案中指出：“最近的研究表明，社会规范和观念是可以改变的，例如，让男性和男孩参与进来，可以赢得他们对性别平等的支持和投入。”“通过更好地理解社会规范和观念如何塑造日常期望、优先事项和实践，可以加快并扩大积极的性别成果。”

hypo_2:
为实现女性平等的最后冲刺
去年，世界经济论坛预测，要在全球每个国家实现性别平等，还需要五代人的时间。如今，世界银行希望大幅缩短这一时间表。
这家国际金融机构正准备推出一项战略，目标是到2030年显著提升女孩和妇女的权利与经济机会。该计划重点通过金融包容性、技术创新以及公共政策和法律的改革，提升包容性和抗风险能力。
该计划的咨询草案中指出：“最新研究表明，社会规范和观念是可以改变的，例如，让男性和男孩参与其中，有助于他们支持并认同性别平等。”“通过更深入地理解社会规范和观念如何影响日常的期望、优先事项和行为，可以加快并扩大积极的性别成果。”

source_sentences: Shifts in thought are harder to quantify than bank loans for rural women or school enrollment for girls. Yet there is plenty of evidence that female agency can move mountains. In Iran, for example, women have led the greatest threat to the Islamic government in 40 years simply by refusing to comply with laws that force them to cover their hair. In some of the 130 countries with minimum quotas for female representation in government, such as India, male resistance to female voting and political activism has eased.

In some rural African communities, civil society organizations are replacing a harmful rite of passage with health education. One such program helped Kamanda Timayio, leader of the Masai village of Maparasha, Kenya, change his mind about female genital mutilation. He told Le Monde that he had "emerged from ignorance" and would abandon the practice.

source_text:
Shifts in thought are harder to quantify than bank loans for rural women or school enrollment for girls. Yet there is plenty of evidence that female agency can move mountains. In Iran, for example, women have led the greatest threat to the Islamic government in 40 years simply by refusing to comply with laws that force them to cover their hair. In some of the 130 countries with minimum quotas for female representation in government, such as India, male resistance to female voting and political activism has eased.
In some rural African communities, civil society organizations are replacing a harmful rite of passage with health education. One such program helped Kamanda Timayio, leader of the Masai village of Maparasha, Kenya, change his mind about female genital mutilation. He told Le Monde that he had "emerged from ignorance" and would abandon the practice.

source_sentences: The World Bank cites other examples. From 1970 to 2022, Bangladesh quadrupled female literacy rates and doubled female participation in the labor force. Its gross domestic product more than tripled. The change gathered its own momentum. Recruiting salaried women as teachers and health workers from within their own communities boosted trust "and made women's mobility and work more socially acceptable."

The bank's plan would target norms and institutions that may still require generational shifts. It has taken Rwanda more than two decades to establish itself as a model for land reforms that boost economic empowerment for women."No one benefits if women are held back," Rwanda President Paul Kagame said, arguing for land reform in 2015. "We have to change mindsets, not just the laws."
The World Bank hopes to spread that message.
target_sentences: 世界银行还列举了其他例子。从 1970 年到 2022 年，孟加拉国女性识字率翻了两番，女性劳动力参与率翻了一番。其国内生产总值增长了两倍多。这种变化积聚了动力。从社区内部招募女性担任有薪教师和卫生工作者的做法增强了信任，“并使女性的流动和工作在社会上更容易被接受。”
世界银行的计划将针对那些可能仍需几代人才能转变的规范和制度。卢旺达花了 20 多年时间推进增强女性经济权能的土地改革，最终成为典范。“如果女性受到阻碍，没有人会受益，”卢旺达总统保罗·卡加梅在 2015 年主张土地改革时表示，“我们必须改变观念，而不仅仅是法律。”
世界银行希望传播这一理念。
source_text:
The World Bank cites other examples. From 1970 to 2022, Bangladesh quadrupled female literacy rates and doubled female participation in the labor force. Its gross domestic product more than tripled. The change gathered its own momentum. Recruiting salaried women as teachers and health workers from within their own communities boosted trust "and made women's mobility and work more socially acceptable."
The bank's plan would target norms and institutions that may still require generational shifts. It has taken Rwanda more than two decades to establish itself as a model for land reforms that boost economic empowerment for women."No one benefits if women are held back," Rwanda President Paul Kagame said, arguing for land reform in 2015. "We have to change mindsets, not just the laws."
The World Bank hopes to spread that message.

世界银行还列举了其他例子。从 1970 年到 2022 年，孟加拉国女性识字率翻了两番，女性劳动力参与率翻了一番。其国内生产总值增长了两倍多。这种变化积聚了动力。从社区内部招募女性担任有薪教师和卫生工作者的做法增强了信任，“并使女性的流动和工作在社会上更容易被接受。”
世界银行的计划将针对那些可能仍需几代人才能转变的规范和制度。卢旺达花了 20 多年时间推进增强女性经济权能的土地改革，最终成为典范。“如果女性受到阻碍，没有人会受益，”卢旺达总统保罗·卡加梅在 2015 年主张土地改革时表示，“我们必须改变观念，而不仅仅是法律。”
世界银行希望传播这一理念。
hypo_1:
世界银行还引用了其他例子。从1970年到2022年，孟加拉国的女性识字率翻了四倍，女性参与劳动力的比例翻了一倍。其国内生产总值更是增长了三倍多。这种变化逐渐形成了自己的势头。从她们自己的社区中招募有薪的女性担任教师和卫生工作者，增强了信任，“并使女性的流动和工作在社会上更容易被接受。”
该银行的计划将针对那些可能仍需要代际转变的规范和制度。卢旺达花了二十多年才确立自己作为土地改革的典范，这种改革能增强女性的经济赋权。“如果女性受到阻碍，没有人会受益，”卢旺达总统保罗·卡加梅在2015年倡导土地改革时说道，“我们必须改变观念，而不仅仅是法律。”
世界银行希望传播这一信息。

世界银行希望传播这一信息。

source_sentences: German farmers and train drivers are scaring Germany's bosses

In Germany, where workers and bosses run many companies jointly, a big strike is unusual. A wave of big strikes is almost unheard of. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. This Mistgabelmop (pitchfork mob), as some have taken to calling it, will test Germany's harmonious labour relations in the year to come.
target_sentences: 德国农民和火车司机让老板们心惊肉跳
在德国，许多公司都由工人和老板共同经营，大规模罢工并不常见。多行业大规模罢工潮更是闻所未闻。现在，这个“共同决策”的国家正面临着愤怒农民长达八天的“行动周”，他们用拖拉机封锁了道路；铁路工人也举行了为期三天的罢工；更糟糕的是，医生们可能也要举行罢工，他们已经在圣诞节和元旦期间关闭了诊所。一些人称之为“干草叉暴民”（Mistgabelmop），这场风暴将在未来一年考验德国和谐的劳资关系。

This Mistgabelmop (pitchfork mob), as some have taken to calling it, will test Germany's harmonious labour relations in the year to come.

德国农民和火车司机让老板们心惊肉跳
在德国，许多公司都由工人和老板共同经营，大规模罢工并不常见。多行业大规模罢工潮更是闻所未闻。现在，这个“共同决策”的国家正面临着愤怒农民长达八天的“行动周”，他们用拖拉机封锁了道路；铁路工人也举行了为期三天的罢工；更糟糕的是，医生们可能也要举行罢工，他们已经在圣诞节和元旦期间关闭了诊所。一些人称之为“干草叉暴民”（Mistgabelmop），这场风暴将在未来一年考验德国和谐的劳资关系。
hypo_1:
德国农民和火车司机正在吓坏了德国的企业主
在德国，工人和老板共同经营许多公司，因此大规模罢工并不常见。一波大规模罢工更是几乎闻所未闻。目前这个“共同决策”的国家正同时面临愤怒农民发起的为期八天的“行动周”，他们用拖拉机封锁道路；铁路工人的为期三天的罢工；更别提医生即将举行的罢工，他们已经在圣诞节和元旦之间关闭了诊所。一些人称这种现象为“矛头群体”（Mistgabelmop），它将在未来一年中考验德国和谐的劳资关系。

德国农民和火车司机正在让德国的企业主感到不安
在德国，工人和老板共同管理许多公司，因此大规模罢工并不常见，一波接一波的大规模罢工更是几乎闻所未闻。如今，这个以“共同决策”著称的国家，正同时面临愤怒农民发起的为期八天的“行动周”——他们用拖拉机封锁道路；铁路工人为期三天的罢工；以及医生即将举行的罢工，他们已在今年圣诞节至元旦期间关闭了诊所。一些人将这一现象称为“矛头群体”（Mistgabelmop），它将在未来一年中对德国和谐的劳资关系构成考验。

source_sentences: The protests were ostensibly set off by the government's decision to end subsidies for diesel fuel used in agriculture and to cut an exemption from car tax for farm vehicles. These measures pushed farmers over the edge. It also mobilised other angry workers, already straining under the pressure of inflation, recession and the government's self-imposed austerity. On January 9th drivers of freight and passenger trains at Deutsche Bahn, the national railway, began a strike over working hours and pay.
target_sentences: 表面上看，抗议活动的导火索是政府决定终止对农用柴油的补贴，并削减对农用车辆的汽车税豁免。这些措施让农民忍无可忍。这也带动了一些愤怒的工人，他们在通货膨胀、经济衰退和政府自我实施的紧缩政策的压力下苦苦挣扎。1 月 9 日，德国国家铁路公司的货运和客运列车司机就工作时间和工资问题举行罢工。

source_sentences: In an effort to defuse the tension with the farmers, the government agreed to a gradual removal of the diesel subsidy over three years and to keeping the exemption from the car tax. The farmers pooh-poohed the concessions as insufficient. On January 4th an aggressive group of them prevented Robert Habeck, the economy minister, from disembarking from a ferry on his return from a family holiday. If the train drivers are similarly unimpressed, that could prove expensive for German business, reckons IW Köln, a think-tank. The rail strike could cost businesses €100m ($110m) a day if it forced them to interrupt production. The car, chemical and steel industries, Germany's biggest, are especially reliant on rail transport.
target_sentences: 为了缓和与农民之间的紧张关系，政府同意在三年内逐步取消柴油补贴，并保留汽车税的豁免政策。农民们对这些让步嗤之以鼻，认为远远不够。1 月 4 日，经济部长罗伯特·哈贝克在结束家庭假期后，乘坐渡轮返回时，遭到一群激进分子的阻拦，无法下船。智库 IW Köln 认为，如果火车司机也对政府的方案不买账，那么对德国企业来说，代价可能十分高昂。如果铁路罢工迫使企业中断生产，每天可能造成 1 亿欧元（1.1 亿美元）的损失。作为德国的支柱产业，汽车、化工和钢铁行业尤其依赖铁路运输。
source_text: In an effort to defuse the tension with the farmers, the government agreed to a gradual removal of the diesel subsidy over three years and to keeping the exemption from the car tax. The farmers pooh-poohed the concessions as insufficient. On January 4th an aggressive group of them prevented Robert Habeck, the economy minister, from disembarking from a ferry on his return from a family holiday. If the train drivers are similarly unimpressed, that could prove expensive for German business, reckons IW Köln, a think-tank. The rail strike could cost businesses €100m ($110m) a day if it forced them to interrupt production. The car, chemical and steel industries, Germany's biggest, are especially reliant on rail transport.

hypo_1: 为了缓解与农民的紧张关系，政府同意在三年内逐步取消柴油补贴，并保留免征汽车税的政策。但农民们认为这些让步并不足够，对此嗤之以鼻。1月4日，一群态度强硬的农民阻止了经济部长罗伯特·哈贝克（Robert Habeck）从渡轮上走下，当时他刚结束家庭假期返回。科隆经济研究所（IW Köln）认为，如果火车司机同样不买账，这可能会对德国企业造成高昂代价。如果罢工迫使企业中断生产，铁路罢工每天可能使企业损失1亿欧元（1.1亿美元）。德国最大的汽车、化工和钢铁行业尤其依赖铁路运输。

source_sentences: The workers" mood is increasingly angry. "Appeals are circulating with fantasies of revolution," warned Mr Habeck. The far-right Alternative for Germany party is doing its best to fan the grievances. In Dresden the Free Saxons, another far-right group, infiltrated the farmers" protest calling for the "extinction of the traffic light" (as the governing coalition of the Social Democrats, Free Democrats and Greens is referred to because of their party colours).
target_sentences: 工人们的情绪越来越愤怒。“各种带有革命幻想的呼吁正在流传，”哈贝克先生警告说。极右翼政党德国选择党正在竭尽全力煽动不满情绪。在德累斯顿，另一个极右翼组织“自由撒克逊人”渗透到农民的抗议活动中，呼吁“熄灭交通灯”（由于其代表色，由社民党、自由民主党和绿党组成的执政联盟被称为“交通灯联盟”）。
source_text: The workers" mood is increasingly angry. "Appeals are circulating with fantasies of revolution," warned Mr Habeck. The far-right Alternative for Germany party is doing its best to fan the grievances. In Dresden the Free Saxons, another far-right group, infiltrated the farmers" protest calling for the "extinction of the traffic light" (as the governing coalition of the Social Democrats, Free Democrats and Greens is referred to because of their party colours).
target_text: 工人们的情绪越来越愤怒。“各种带有革命幻想的呼吁正在流传，”哈贝克先生警告说。极右翼政党德国选择党正在竭尽全力煽动不满情绪。在德累斯顿，另一个极右翼组织“自由撒克逊人”渗透到农民的抗议活动中，呼吁“熄灭交通灯”（由于其代表色，由社民党、自由民主党和绿党组成的执政联盟被称为“交通灯联盟”）。
reference_text: 工人们的情绪越来越愤怒。“各种带有革命幻想的呼吁正在流传，”哈贝克先生警告说。极右翼政党德国选择党正在竭尽全力煽动不满情绪。在德累斯顿，另一个极右翼组织“自由撒克逊人”渗透到农民的抗议活动中，呼吁“熄灭交通灯”（由于其代表色，由社民党、自由民主党和绿党组成的执政联盟被称为“交通灯联盟”）。
hypo_1: 工人们的情绪日益愤怒。“呼吁革命的幻想正在传播，”哈贝克先生警告道。德国右翼的另类选择党正在尽其所能煽动不满情绪。在德累斯顿，另一个右翼组织“自由萨克森人”渗透进了农民的抗议活动，呼吁“让交通灯灭绝”（这是指由社会民主党、自由民主党和绿党组成的执政联盟，因其党派颜色而得名）。

source_sentences: Thomas Puls of IW Köln fears that the strikes will harm the image of Germany as a place for business. Local bosses are already fretting about a German version of the gilets jaunes protests in France in 2018, which culminated in yellow-jacketed demonstrators torching cars on the Champs-Elysées and the police stepping in with tear gas. Jochen Kopelke, head of Germany's police union, warned in an interview with Tagesspiegel, a daily, that the farmers were probably "just the start of an enormous wave of protest this year." Germany was the only big economy to shrink in 2023, and the year ended on an especially sour note, with an unexpected drop in business confidence in December. This year is shaping up to be even tougher.
target_sentences: IW Köln 的托马斯·普尔斯担心，罢工将损害德国作为商业投资地的形象。当地老板们已经开始担心德国版“黄马甲”运动重演——2018 年的法国黄马甲运动最终演变成身穿黄马甲的示威者在香榭丽舍大街焚烧汽车，警察施放催泪瓦斯驱散人群。德国警察工会主席约亨·科佩尔克在接受《每日镜报》采访时警告说，农民的抗议活动可能“只是今年大规模抗议浪潮的开始”。2023 年，德国是唯一一个出现经济萎缩的主要经济体，年末经济形势尤其严峻，12 月商业信心指数意外下降。今年的经济形势预计将更加艰难。
source_text: Thomas Puls of IW Köln fears that the strikes will harm the image of Germany as a place for business. Local bosses are already fretting about a German version of the gilets jaunes protests in France in 2018, which culminated in yellow-jacketed demonstrators torching cars on the Champs-Elysées and the police stepping in with tear gas. Jochen Kopelke, head of Germany's police union, warned in an interview with Tagesspiegel, a daily, that the farmers were probably "just the start of an enormous wave of protest this year." Germany was the only big economy to shrink in 2023, and the year ended on an especially sour note, with an unexpected drop in business confidence in December. This year is shaping up to be even tougher.
target_text: IW Köln 的托马斯·普尔斯担心，罢工将损害德国作为商业投资地的形象。当地老板们已经开始担心德国版“黄马甲”运动重演——2018 年的法国黄马甲运动最终演变成身穿黄马甲的示威者在香榭丽舍大街焚烧汽车，警察施放催泪瓦斯驱散人群。德国警察工会主席约亨·科佩尔克在接受《每日镜报》采访时警告说，农民的抗议活动可能“只是今年大规模抗议浪潮的开始”。2023 年，德国是唯一一个出现经济萎缩的主要经济体，年末经济形势尤其严峻，12 月商业信心指数意外下降。今年的经济形势预计将更加艰难。
reference_text: IW Köln 的托马斯·普尔斯担心，罢工将损害德国作为商业投资地的形象。当地老板们已经开始担心德国版“黄马甲”运动重演——2018 年的法国黄马甲运动最终演变成身穿黄马甲的示威者在香榭丽舍大街焚烧汽车，警察施放催泪瓦斯驱散人群。德国警察工会主席约亨·科佩尔克在接受《每日镜报》采访时警告说，农民的抗议活动可能“只是今年大规模抗议浪潮的开始”。2023 年，德国是唯一一个出现经济萎缩的主要经济体，年末经济形势尤其严峻，12 月商业信心指数意外下降。今年的经济形势预计将更加艰难。
hypo_1: 科隆工业联合会的托马斯·普尔斯担心，罢工将损害德国作为商业地点的形象。当地企业主们已经开始担心德国会出现类似2018年法国“黄马甲”抗议活动的情况，当时抗议者身穿黄马甲，在香榭丽舍大街焚烧汽车，警方不得不动用催泪瓦斯介入。德国警察工会负责人约亨·科普尔克在接受一份日报《每日镜报》的采访时警告称，农民抗议“可能只是今年巨大抗议浪潮的开始”。德国是2023年唯一出现经济萎缩的主要经济体，而且这一年以特别令人沮丧的基调结束，12月商业信心意外下降。今年的情况看起来将更加艰难。

source_sentences: Brewers froth over winemakers" exemption from anti-waste rules

As the EU debates rules to limit packaging waste, beer producers argue they are being unfairly discriminated against with exemptions for winemakers from reuse targets and deposit-return schemes, but one of Europe's wine industry association chiefs says brewers should "mind their own business."

European brewers have warned that exempting wine and not beer from deposit return schemes and reuse targets is unfair and potentially illegal, as lawmakers enter final talks over a new law designed to turn a surging tide of packaging waste across the EU.

Environment ministers agreed an EU Council negotiating mandate on the proposed Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR) before Christmas, paving the way for imminent political talks with the European Parliament, which are already underway at the technical level.
target_sentences: 啤酒酿造商对葡萄酒酿造商免于遵守反浪费规则感到不满
欧盟正在讨论限制包装废弃物的相关法规，啤酒生产商认为他们受到了不公平的歧视，因为葡萄酒生产商可以免于再利用目标和押金返还计划。但欧洲葡萄酒行业协会的一位负责人表示，啤酒酿造商应该“管好自己的事”。
欧洲啤酒酿造商警告称，将葡萄酒而不是啤酒排除在押金返还计划和再利用目标之外是不公平的，而且可能是非法的。目前，立法者正就一项旨在遏制欧盟包装废弃物激增的新法律进行最终谈判。
在圣诞节前，各国环境部长就拟议的《包装和包装废弃物法规》（PPWR）达成了欧盟理事会的谈判授权，为即将与欧洲议会进行的政治谈判铺平了道路。目前，技术层面的谈判已在进行中。

European brewers have warned that exempting wine and not beer from deposit return schemes and reuse targets is unfair and potentially illegal, as lawmakers enter final talks over a new law designed to turn a surging tide of packaging waste across the EU.
Environment ministers agreed an EU Council negotiating mandate on the proposed Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR) before Christmas, paving the way for imminent political talks with the European Parliament, which are already underway at the technical level.

欧盟正在讨论限制包装废弃物的相关法规，啤酒生产商认为他们受到了不公平的歧视，因为葡萄酒生产商可以免于再利用目标和押金返还计划。但欧洲葡萄酒行业协会的一位负责人表示，啤酒酿造商应该“管好自己的事”。
欧洲啤酒酿造商警告称，将葡萄酒而不是啤酒排除在押金返还计划和再利用目标之外是不公平的，而且可能是非法的。目前，立法者正就一项旨在遏制欧盟包装废弃物激增的新法律进行最终谈判。
在圣诞节前，各国环境部长就拟议的《包装和包装废弃物法规》（PPWR）达成了欧盟理事会的谈判授权，为即将与欧洲议会进行的政治谈判铺平了道路。目前，技术层面的谈判已在进行中。
hypo_1:
酿酒商因葡萄酒行业免受反浪费规则约束而愤怒
随着欧盟就限制包装废弃物的规则展开讨论，啤酒生产商认为，由于葡萄酒行业在重复使用目标和押金返还计划方面享有豁免，他们受到了不公平的歧视，但欧洲葡萄酒行业协会的一位负责人表示，酿酒商应“管好自己的事”。
欧洲啤酒生产商警告称，在押金返还计划和重复使用目标方面对葡萄酒免税而对啤酒不免税是不公平的，也可能是非法的，因为立法者即将就一项旨在遏制欧盟范围内激增的包装废弃物的新法律展开最终讨论。
环境部长们在圣诞节前就拟议的《包装及包装废弃物法规》（PPWR）达成了欧盟理事会的谈判授权，为即将与欧洲议会进行的政治谈判铺平了道路，目前相关技术层面的谈判已经展开。

酿酒商因葡萄酒行业免于反浪费规定而感到不满
在欧盟就限制包装废弃物的规则展开讨论之际，啤酒生产商指出，葡萄酒行业在重复使用目标和押金返还计划方面享有豁免，这让他们感到受到了不公平对待。然而，欧洲葡萄酒行业协会的一位负责人表示，啤酒生产商应“专注自身事务”。

source_sentences: "Our position is clear," the trade association Brewers of Europe wrote to MEPs and government negotiators (10 January). "If targets and mandatory requirements in the PPWR apply to beer then there is a legal obligation that they apply to all alcoholic beverage categories."

The 18 December ministerial summit yielded a carve out for winemakers from the requirement that, by the end of the decade, 10% of products must be supplied in reusable containers within a system for reuse or refill, rising to 40% in 2040. The exemption would also apply to the requirement, likewise supported by the European Parliament, that wine should be exempt from deposit-return schemes that should be put in place by 2029 under the proposal.
target_sentences: “我们的立场很明确，”欧洲啤酒酿造商贸易协会致函欧洲议会议员和政府谈判代表（1 月 10 日），“如果《包装和包装废弃物法规》中的目标和强制性要求适用于啤酒，那么就有法律义务确保其也适用于所有其他酒精饮料类别。”
12 月 18 日举行的部长级峰会决定，葡萄酒生产商可以免于遵守以下要求：到 2030 年底，10% 的产品必须使用可重复使用的容器，并在再利用或再灌装系统中供应，到 2040 年，这一比例将升至 40%。此外，根据这项同样得到欧洲议会支持的提案，葡萄酒还可以免于执行押金返还计划，根据提案规定，其他酒类生产商应在 2029 年之前实施押金返还计划。
source_text:
"Our position is clear," the trade association Brewers of Europe wrote to MEPs and government negotiators (10 January). "If targets and mandatory requirements in the PPWR apply to beer then there is a legal obligation that they apply to all alcoholic beverage categories."
The 18 December ministerial summit yielded a carve out for winemakers from the requirement that, by the end of the decade, 10% of products must be supplied in reusable containers within a system for reuse or refill, rising to 40% in 2040. The exemption would also apply to the requirement, likewise supported by the European Parliament, that wine should be exempt from deposit-return schemes that should be put in place by 2029 under the proposal.
target_text: “我们的立场很明确，”欧洲啤酒酿造商贸易协会致函欧洲议会议员和政府谈判代表（1 月 10 日），“如果《包装和包装废弃物法规》中的目标和强制性要求适用于啤酒，那么就有法律义务确保其也适用于所有其他酒精饮料类别。” 12 月 18 日举行的部长级峰会决定，葡萄酒生产商可以免于遵守以下要求：到 2030 年底，10% 的产品必须使用可重复使用的容器，并在再利用或再灌装系统中供应，到 2040 年，这一比例将升至 40%。此外，根据这项同样得到欧洲议会支持的提案，葡萄酒还可以免于执行押金返还计划，根据提案规定，其他酒类生产商应在 2029 年之前实施押金返还计划。
reference_text:
“我们的立场很明确，”欧洲啤酒酿造商贸易协会致函欧洲议会议员和政府谈判代表（1 月 10 日），“如果《包装和包装废弃物法规》中的目标和强制性要求适用于啤酒，那么就有法律义务确保其也适用于所有其他酒精饮料类别。”
12 月 18 日举行的部长级峰会决定，葡萄酒生产商可以免于遵守以下要求：到 2030 年底，10% 的产品必须使用可重复使用的容器，并在再利用或再灌装系统中供应，到 2040 年，这一比例将升至 40%。此外，根据这项同样得到欧洲议会支持的提案，葡萄酒还可以免于执行押金返还计划，根据提案规定，其他酒类生产商应在 2029 年之前实施押金返还计划。
hypo_1:
“我们的立场是明确的，”欧洲酿酒商协会在1月10日致欧洲议会议员和政府谈判代表的信中写道：“如果《一次性塑料制品法规》（PPWR）中的目标和强制性要求适用于啤酒，那么它们就必须适用于所有酒精饮料类别，这是法律义务。”
12月18日的部长级峰会为葡萄酒生产商提供了一项豁免，即根据该要求，到本十年末，10%的产品必须通过再利用或再填充系统以可重复使用容器供应，到2040年这一比例将上升至40%。此外，该豁免还适用于欧洲议会同样支持的另一项要求，即葡萄酒应被排除在2029年前根据该提案设立的押金返还制度之外。

12月18日的部长级峰会为葡萄酒生产商提供了一项豁免，即根据该规定，到本十年末，10%的产品必须通过再利用或再填充系统以可重复使用容器供应，到2040年这一比例将提高至40%。此外，该豁免同样适用于欧洲议会支持的另一项要求，即葡萄酒应被排除在2029年前根据该提案设立的押金返还制度之外。

source_sentences: Both the Czech and Belgian ministers immediately expressed reservations at the 18 December summit about the unequal treatment for brewers, but acquiesced. Belgium, which now chairs the rotating EU Council presidency and is therefore in principle neutral in terms of inter-governmental negotiations, hopes to clinch a deal with the parliament by early March.

Ignacio Sánchez Recarte, secretary general of the Comité Européen des Entreprises Vins trade association representing some 7,000 wine producers across Europe, is dismissive of the concerns of the beer makers. He told Euronews that a market dominated by multinational brewing conglomerates bears no comparison with one comprised almost entirely of small, domestic producers.
target_sentences: 在 12 月 18 日的峰会上，捷克和比利时的部长当场对啤酒酿造商遭受的不平等待遇表示了保留意见，但最终还是默许了。比利时目前担任欧盟理事会轮值主席国，因此原则上在政府间谈判中保持中立。比利时希望在 3 月初与议会达成协议。
欧洲葡萄酒企业委员会秘书长伊格纳西奥·桑切斯·雷卡特对啤酒酿造商的担忧不屑一顾，该委员会代表了欧洲约 7000 家葡萄酒生产商。他告诉欧洲新闻台：由跨国啤酒集团主导的市场与几乎完全由小型国内生产商组成的市场根本没有可比性。
source_text:
Both the Czech and Belgian ministers immediately expressed reservations at the 18 December summit about the unequal treatment for brewers, but acquiesced. Belgium, which now chairs the rotating EU Council presidency and is therefore in principle neutral in terms of inter-governmental negotiations, hopes to clinch a deal with the parliament by early March.
Ignacio Sánchez Recarte, secretary general of the Comité Européen des Entreprises Vins trade association representing some 7,000 wine producers across Europe, is dismissive of the concerns of the beer makers. He told Euronews that a market dominated by multinational brewing conglomerates bears no comparison with one comprised almost entirely of small, domestic producers.
target_text: 在 12 月 18 日的峰会上，捷克和比利时的部长当场对啤酒酿造商遭受的不平等待遇表示了保留意见，但最终还是默许了。比利时目前担任欧盟理事会轮值主席国，因此原则上在政府间谈判中保持中立。比利时希望在 3 月初与议会达成协议。 欧洲葡萄酒企业委员会秘书长伊格纳西奥·桑切斯·雷卡特对啤酒酿造商的担忧不屑一顾，该委员会代表了欧洲约 7000 家葡萄酒生产商。他告诉欧洲新闻台：由跨国啤酒集团主导的市场与几乎完全由小型国内生产商组成的市场根本没有可比性。

hypo_1:
捷克和比利时部长在12月18日的峰会上立即对酿酒商受到的不平等待遇表示保留意见，但最终还是接受了。目前比利时担任欧盟理事会轮值主席国，因此在政府间谈判中原则上保持中立，希望能在3月初之前与议会达成协议。
代表欧洲约7000家葡萄酒生产商的欧洲葡萄酒企业委员会贸易协会秘书长伊格纳西奥·桑切斯·雷卡尔特（Ignacio Sánchez Recarte）对啤酒生产商的担忧不屑一顾。他告诉欧新社，一个由跨国酿酒集团主导的市场，与几乎完全由小型国内生产商组成的市场根本无法相提并论。

source_sentences: More than 99% of the domestic wine sector is made up of micro- to medium-sized companies, Sánchez Recarte said, questioning the solidity of legal arguments made by brewers and asserting that his organisation had focused on presenting policy makers with information "relevant and appropriate" to its own industry.

"It is not my role to estimate if the beer sector should have this or that target, as it would depend on the intrinsic characteristics of their own sector," Sánchez Recarte said. "In the same way, brewers should mind their own business and focus on their own responsibilities."

Brewers of Europe shared with Euronews a brief legal analysis it sent to the European Commission last year, where it argues that wine and beer are competing products that are "at least partially, substitutable with each other," and which argued that rules favouring one over the other would distort the market.
target_sentences: 桑切斯·雷卡特表示，超过 99% 的国内葡萄酒行业由中小型企业组成。他质疑啤酒酿造商提出的法律论据的可靠性，并声称其组织专注于向政策制定者提供与其自身行业“相关且适当”的信息。
“我的职责不是评估啤酒行业是否应该有这样或那样的目标，因为这取决于他们自身行业的特点，”桑切斯·雷卡特说，“同样，啤酒酿造商应该管好自己的事，专注于他们自己的责任。”
欧洲啤酒酿造商协会与欧洲新闻台分享了去年提交给欧盟委员会的一份简短法律分析报告，其中认为，葡萄酒和啤酒是“至少可以部分相互替代”的竞争产品，偏袒任何一方的规则都会扭曲市场。
source_text:
More than 99% of the domestic wine sector is made up of micro- to medium-sized companies, Sánchez Recarte said, questioning the solidity of legal arguments made by brewers and asserting that his organisation had focused on presenting policy makers with information "relevant and appropriate" to its own industry.
"It is not my role to estimate if the beer sector should have this or that target, as it would depend on the intrinsic characteristics of their own sector," Sánchez Recarte said. "In the same way, brewers should mind their own business and focus on their own responsibilities."
Brewers of Europe shared with Euronews a brief legal analysis it sent to the European Commission last year, where it argues that wine and beer are competing products that are "at least partially, substitutable with each other," and which argued that rules favouring one over the other would distort the market.
target_text: 桑切斯·雷卡特表示，超过 99% 的国内葡萄酒行业由中小型企业组成。他质疑啤酒酿造商提出的法律论据的可靠性，并声称其组织专注于向政策制定者提供与其自身行业“相关且适当”的信息。 “我的职责不是评估啤酒行业是否应该有这样或那样的目标，因为这取决于他们自身行业的特点，”桑切斯·雷卡特说，“同样，啤酒酿造商应该管好自己的事，专注于他们自己的责任。” 欧洲啤酒酿造商协会与欧洲新闻台分享了去年提交给欧盟委员会的一份简短法律分析报告，其中认为，葡萄酒和啤酒是“至少可以部分相互替代”的竞争产品，偏袒任何一方的规则都会扭曲市场。
reference_text:
桑切斯·雷卡特表示，超过 99% 的国内葡萄酒行业由中小型企业组成。他质疑啤酒酿造商提出的法律论据的可靠性，并声称其组织专注于向政策制定者提供与其自身行业“相关且适当”的信息。
“我的职责不是评估啤酒行业是否应该有这样或那样的目标，因为这取决于他们自身行业的特点，”桑切斯·雷卡特说，“同样，啤酒酿造商应该管好自己的事，专注于他们自己的责任。”
欧洲啤酒酿造商协会与欧洲新闻台分享了去年提交给欧盟委员会的一份简短法律分析报告，其中认为，葡萄酒和啤酒是“至少可以部分相互替代”的竞争产品，偏袒任何一方的规则都会扭曲市场。
hypo_1:
桑切斯·雷卡尔特表示，国内葡萄酒行业超过99%由微型至中型公司组成，他质疑酿酒商提出的法律论据的合理性，并强调其组织专注于向政策制定者提供“相关且适当”的信息，以反映其自身行业的情况。
“评估啤酒行业是否应设定这个或那个目标并不是我的职责，因为这取决于他们行业自身的内在特点，”桑切斯·雷卡尔特说道。“同样地，酿酒商也应专注于自己的事务和责任。”
欧洲酿酒商协会向欧新社分享了去年发送给欧盟委员会的一份简要法律分析，其中指出葡萄酒和啤酒是“至少部分可以互相替代”的竞争产品，并认为对一方有利的规则会扭曲市场。
hypo_1_sentences: 桑切斯·雷卡尔特表示，国内葡萄酒行业超过99%由微型至中型公司组成，他质疑酿酒商提出的法律论据的合理性，并强调其组织专注于向政策制定者提供“相关且适当”的信息，以反映其自身行业的情况。
“评估啤酒行业是否应设定这个或那个目标并不是我的职责，因为这取决于他们行业自身的内在特点，”桑切斯·雷卡尔特说道。“同样地，酿酒商也应专注于自己的事务和责任。”

source_sentences: Simon Spillane, the lobby group's head of operations, said brewers were "already leading the way" in packaging sustainability, citing the example of beer kegs being reused around 165 times before being crushed and recycled after 30 years. They support reuse recycling systems already in place in many countries, he said.

"We therefore advocate for an ambitious PPWR but need a level playing field in packaging legislation where beer and other alcoholic beverages play by the same rules, with each sector contributing fairly to reaching the targets and supporting collection systems," Spillane told. "Any other approach puts the brewers at a competitive disadvantage."
target_sentences: 该游说团体的运营主管西蒙·斯皮兰表示，啤酒酿造商在包装可持续发展方面“已经处于领先地位”，他举例说，啤酒桶可以重复使用约 165 次，30 年后才会被压碎并回收利用。他说，他们支持许多国家/地区已经实施的再利用和回收系统。
“因此，我们支持制定一项雄心勃勃的《包装和包装废弃物法规》，但需要在包装立法方面建立公平的竞争环境，让啤酒和其他酒精饮料遵循同样的规则，每个行业都为实现目标和支持收集系统做出公平贡献，”斯皮兰说，“任何其他做法都会使啤酒酿造商处于竞争劣势。”
source_text:
Simon Spillane, the lobby group's head of operations, said brewers were "already leading the way" in packaging sustainability, citing the example of beer kegs being reused around 165 times before being crushed and recycled after 30 years. They support reuse recycling systems already in place in many countries, he said.
"We therefore advocate for an ambitious PPWR but need a level playing field in packaging legislation where beer and other alcoholic beverages play by the same rules, with each sector contributing fairly to reaching the targets and supporting collection systems," Spillane told. "Any other approach puts the brewers at a competitive disadvantage."
target_text: 该游说团体的运营主管西蒙·斯皮兰表示，啤酒酿造商在包装可持续发展方面“已经处于领先地位”，他举例说，啤酒桶可以重复使用约 165 次，30 年后才会被压碎并回收利用。他说，他们支持许多国家/地区已经实施的再利用和回收系统。 “因此，我们支持制定一项雄心勃勃的《包装和包装废弃物法规》，但需要在包装立法方面建立公平的竞争环境，让啤酒和其他酒精饮料遵循同样的规则，每个行业都为实现目标和支持收集系统做出公平贡献，”斯皮兰说，“任何其他做法都会使啤酒酿造商处于竞争劣势。”
reference_text:
该游说团体的运营主管西蒙·斯皮兰表示，啤酒酿造商在包装可持续发展方面“已经处于领先地位”，他举例说，啤酒桶可以重复使用约 165 次，30 年后才会被压碎并回收利用。他说，他们支持许多国家/地区已经实施的再利用和回收系统。
“因此，我们支持制定一项雄心勃勃的《包装和包装废弃物法规》，但需要在包装立法方面建立公平的竞争环境，让啤酒和其他酒精饮料遵循同样的规则，每个行业都为实现目标和支持收集系统做出公平贡献，”斯皮兰说，“任何其他做法都会使啤酒酿造商处于竞争劣势。”
hypo_1:
西蒙·斯皮兰（Simon Spillane），该游说团体的运营主管表示，酿酒商在包装可持续性方面“已经走在前列”，他举了一个例子，啤酒桶在使用了约165次后，会在30年后被压碎并回收利用。他表示，他们支持已在许多国家实施的重复使用回收系统。
“因此，我们倡导雄心勃勃的《一次性塑料制品法规》（PPWR），但需要在包装立法中实现公平竞争环境，使啤酒和其他酒精饮料遵循相同的规则，每个行业都公平地为实现目标和支助收集系统做出贡献，”斯皮兰表示。“任何其他做法都会使酿酒商处于竞争劣势。”

source_sentences: The Biden Administration Is Letting Corporate Criminals Off the Hook

Tim Whitehouse, a former EPA enforcement attorney and the executive director of Public Employees for Environmental Responsibility, praised the Biden administration's recent improvements on enforcement while acknowledging the strong headwinds such efforts face. "It takes years of sustained funding and political support to build a good enforcement program," he told me. "The instability in Congress is not only demoralizing to EPA staff but undermines their ability to think strategically over the long term."
target_sentences: 拜登政府让企业罪犯逍遥法外
前美国国家环境保护局（EPA）执法律师兼“公共雇员环保责任”组织执行董事蒂姆·怀特豪斯称赞了拜登政府近期在执法方面取得的进步，但也承认此类工作面临重重阻力。“制定良好的执法计划需要持续多年的资金投入和政治支持，”他告诉我，“国会的不稳定不仅会打击 EPA 员工的士气，还会削弱他们进行长期战略思考的能力。”

The Biden Administration Is Letting Corporate Criminals Off the Hook
Tim Whitehouse, a former EPA enforcement attorney and the executive director of Public Employees for Environmental Responsibility, praised the Biden administration's recent improvements on enforcement while acknowledging the strong headwinds such efforts face. "It takes years of sustained funding and political support to build a good enforcement program," he told me. "The instability in Congress is not only demoralizing to EPA staff but undermines their ability to think strategically over the long term."

source_sentences: The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.
target_sentences: 美国国家环境保护局（EPA）的问题与美国司法部的问题虽然性质不同，但也并非毫无关联。美国司法部通过其环境和自然资源司（ENRD）处理环境犯罪案件。EPA 执法部门的助理部长乌尔曼在加入 EPA 之前，曾长期担任 ENRD 环境犯罪科的负责人，任期为 1990 年至 2007 年。EPA 将其最严重的民事和刑事案件移交给 ENRD 处理，但 ENRD 作为一个资金相对不足的部门，在选择处理哪些案件时，往往需要依赖其他机构的帮助。2022 财年，EPA 移交给美国司法部的案件数量（88 起）少于 2000 年以来的任何一年，民事司法案件的结案数量也少于 2000 年以来的任何一年。正如“环境廉正项目”组织指出的那样，即使是特朗普执政期间的 EPA，平均每年也能审结 94 起民事案件，并向司法部移交 106 起案件。

The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.
target_text: 美国国家环境保护局（EPA）的问题与美国司法部的问题虽然性质不同，但也并非毫无关联。美国司法部通过其环境和自然资源司（ENRD）处理环境犯罪案件。EPA 执法部门的助理部长乌尔曼在加入 EPA 之前，曾长期担任 ENRD 环境犯罪科的负责人，任期为 1990 年至 2007 年。EPA 将其最严重的民事和刑事案件移交给 ENRD 处理，但 ENRD 作为一个资金相对不足的部门，在选择处理哪些案件时，往往需要依赖其他机构的帮助。2022 财年，EPA 移交给美国司法部的案件数量（88 起）少于 2000 年以来的任何一年，民事司法案件的结案数量也少于 2000 年以来的任何一年。正如“环境廉正项目”组织指出的那样，即使是特朗普执政期间的 EPA，平均每年也能审结 94 起民事案件，并向司法部移交 106 起案件。
reference_text: 美国国家环境保护局（EPA）的问题与美国司法部的问题虽然性质不同，但也并非毫无关联。美国司法部通过其环境和自然资源司（ENRD）处理环境犯罪案件。EPA 执法部门的助理部长乌尔曼在加入 EPA 之前，曾长期担任 ENRD 环境犯罪科的负责人，任期为 1990 年至 2007 年。EPA 将其最严重的民事和刑事案件移交给 ENRD 处理，但 ENRD 作为一个资金相对不足的部门，在选择处理哪些案件时，往往需要依赖其他机构的帮助。2022 财年，EPA 移交给美国司法部的案件数量（88 起）少于 2000 年以来的任何一年，民事司法案件的结案数量也少于 2000 年以来的任何一年。正如“环境廉正项目”组织指出的那样，即使是特朗普执政期间的 EPA，平均每年也能审结 94 起民事案件，并向司法部移交 106 起案件。
hypo_1: 美国环境保护署（EPA）面临的问题与司法部（Department of Justice）的问题虽有不同，但并非毫无关联。司法部通过其环境与自然资源司（Environment and Natural Resources Division，简称ENRD）处理环境犯罪案件。在加入EPA之前，乌尔曼（Uhlmann）——EPA执法助理秘书——曾长期担任该司环境犯罪科（Environmental Crimes Section）的负责人，任职时间从1990年到2007年。EPA将其最严重的民事和刑事案件提交给ENRD，而ENRD作为一个资金相对不足的机构，通常依赖其他机构帮助其决定应采取哪些行动。在2022财政年度，EPA提交给司法部（DOJ）的案件数量（88件）是自2000年以来最少的，同时结束的民事司法案件数量也是自那时以来最少的。正如“环境诚信项目”（Environmental Integrity Project）指出的那样，即使在特朗普政府时期，EPA平均每年也完成了94起民事案件，并每年向司法部移交了106起案件。
hypo_1_sentences: 美国环境保护署（EPA）面临的问题与司法部（Department of Justice）的问题虽有不同，但并非毫无关联。司法部通过其环境与自然资源司（Environment and Natural Resources Division，简称ENRD）处理环境犯罪案件。在加入EPA之前，乌尔曼（Uhlmann）——EPA执法助理秘书——曾长期担任该司环境犯罪科（Environmental Crimes Section）的负责人，任职时间从1990年到2007年。EPA将其最严重的民事和刑事案件提交给ENRD，而ENRD作为一个资金相对不足的机构，通常依赖其他机构帮助其决定应采取哪些行动。在2022财政年度，EPA提交给司法部（DOJ）的案件数量（88件）是自2000年以来最少的，同时结束的民事司法案件数量也是自那时以来最少的。正如“环境诚信项目”（Environmental Integrity Project）指出的那样，即使在特朗普政府时期，EPA平均每年也完成了94起民事案件，并每年向司法部移交了106起案件。

source_sentences: The Department of Justice's overall approach to corporate crimes has come under intense scrutiny from advocates. While watchdogs have lauded some steps the department has taken during Merrick Garland's tenure as attorney general - like finally establishing a database on corporate crime - Biden's DOJ has also leaned heavily on leniency agreements that allow companies to defer or avoid prosecution, and encouraged companies to scapegoat individual employees so as to avoid a broader charge. Kenneth Polite Jr., former assistant attorney general for DOJ's Criminal Division, revised the division's corporate enforcement policy so as to limit prosecutions.
target_sentences: 美国司法部处理公司犯罪的总体方针受到了倡导者的密切关注。尽管监管机构对司法部在梅里克·加兰德担任总检察长期间采取的一些措施（例如最终建立了公司犯罪数据库）表示赞赏，但拜登政府的司法部也严重依赖宽大处理协议，允许公司推迟或避免起诉，并鼓励公司将个别员工作为替罪羊，以避免承担更广泛的指控。司法部刑事部门前助理总检察长小肯尼思·波利特修订了该部门的公司执法政策，目的是限制起诉。
source_text: The Department of Justice's overall approach to corporate crimes has come under intense scrutiny from advocates. While watchdogs have lauded some steps the department has taken during Merrick Garland's tenure as attorney general - like finally establishing a database on corporate crime - Biden's DOJ has also leaned heavily on leniency agreements that allow companies to defer or avoid prosecution, and encouraged companies to scapegoat individual employees so as to avoid a broader charge. Kenneth Polite Jr., former assistant attorney general for DOJ's Criminal Division, revised the division's corporate enforcement policy so as to limit prosecutions.
target_text: 美国司法部处理公司犯罪的总体方针受到了倡导者的密切关注。尽管监管机构对司法部在梅里克·加兰德担任总检察长期间采取的一些措施（例如最终建立了公司犯罪数据库）表示赞赏，但拜登政府的司法部也严重依赖宽大处理协议，允许公司推迟或避免起诉，并鼓励公司将个别员工作为替罪羊，以避免承担更广泛的指控。司法部刑事部门前助理总检察长小肯尼思·波利特修订了该部门的公司执法政策，目的是限制起诉。
reference_text: 美国司法部处理公司犯罪的总体方针受到了倡导者的密切关注。尽管监管机构对司法部在梅里克·加兰德担任总检察长期间采取的一些措施（例如最终建立了公司犯罪数据库）表示赞赏，但拜登政府的司法部也严重依赖宽大处理协议，允许公司推迟或避免起诉，并鼓励公司将个别员工作为替罪羊，以避免承担更广泛的指控。司法部刑事部门前助理总检察长小肯尼思·波利特修订了该部门的公司执法政策，目的是限制起诉。
hypo_1: 司法部对企业的整体犯罪处理方式正受到倡导者的强烈审查。虽然监督机构赞扬了梅里克·加兰德担任司法部长期间司法部采取的一些措施——例如最终建立了企业犯罪数据库——但拜登政府的司法部也大量依赖宽大协议，允许企业推迟或避免起诉，并鼓励企业将责任归咎于个别员工，以避免更广泛的指控。司法部刑事司前助理司法部长肯尼斯·波利特二世修订了该司的企业执法政策，以限制起诉。

hypo_2: 司法部对企业犯罪的整体处理方式正受到倡导者的密切关注。尽管监督机构赞扬了梅里克·加兰担任司法部长期间司法部采取的一些举措——例如最终建立了企业犯罪数据库——但拜登政府的司法部也大量依赖宽大协议，允许企业推迟甚至逃避起诉，并鼓励企业将责任推给个别员工，以避免更广泛的指控。司法部刑事司前助理部长肯尼斯·波利特二世修订了该部门的企业执法政策，以限制对企业提起诉讼。

source_sentences: Government Shutdown Debate Fuels House Republican Civil War

Conservative spending hawks in the House of Representatives bucked party leadership today - derailing a series of votes - in protest of Speaker Mike Johnson's recent spending deal with Democratic leadership that they feel does not go far enough in fiscal reductions.

While the Louisiana Republican can avoid confronting the issue for now, on January 19 the country will face its deadline to pass four of 12 annual spending bills. Johnson has publicly stated that he would not support a "continuing resolution" (CR) to extend the deadline on these four bills to the February 2 due date for the remaining eight.
target_sentences: 政府关门辩论加剧众议院共和党内部纷争
今天，众议院的保守派财政鹰派人士反对党内领导，导致一系列表决被搁置，以此抗议众议院议长迈克·约翰逊最近与民主党领导人达成的开支协议，他们认为该协议在财政削减方面力度不够。
虽然这位来自路易斯安那州的共和党人目前可以暂时避免面对这个问题，但1月19日将是美国必须通过12项年度支出法案中的四项的最后期限。约翰逊曾公开表示，他不会支持“持续决议案”将这四项法案的截止日期延长至其余八项法案的2月2日。

Government Shutdown Debate Fuels House Republican Civil War
Conservative spending hawks in the House of Representatives bucked party leadership today - derailing a series of votes - in protest of Speaker Mike Johnson's recent spending deal with Democratic leadership that they feel does not go far enough in fiscal reductions.
While the Louisiana Republican can avoid confronting the issue for now, on January 19 the country will face its deadline to pass four of 12 annual spending bills. Johnson has publicly stated that he would not support a "continuing resolution" (CR) to extend the deadline on these four bills to the February 2 due date for the remaining eight.

虽然这位来自路易斯安那州的共和党人目前可以暂时避免面对这个问题，但1月19日将是美国必须通过12项年度支出法案中的四项的最后期限。约翰逊曾公开表示，他不会支持“持续决议案”将这四项法案的截止日期延长至其余八项法案的2月2日。
hypo_1:
政府停摆辩论引发众议院共和党内战
众议院中保守派的支出鹰派人士今天违背党派领导，抵制了一系列投票，以抗议众议院议长迈克·约翰逊最近与民主党领导层达成的支出协议，他们认为该协议在削减财政支出方面做得还不够。
尽管这位来自路易斯安那州的共和党人目前可以暂时回避这个问题，但1月19日，该国将面临通过12项年度支出法案中4项的截止日期。约翰逊公开表示，他不会支持一项“持续决议”（CR），将这4项法案的截止日期延长至2月2日，即其余8项法案的截止日期。

source_sentences: However, with that deadline just 9 days away, Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell has said Congress will need to pass a CR to keep things open, meaning the speaker may soon break a promise he made, largely to appease his right flank. Such a maneuver could ignite a heated ideological battle in a closely divided House over the GOP's role in spending cuts that may see the government face a partial shutdown or Johnson removed from his job.
target_sentences: 然而，随着截止期限仅剩九天，参议院共和党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔表示，国会需要通过一项持续决议案以维持政府继续运作，这意味着众议院议长可能很快就会为了安抚右翼阵营而违反他所做的承诺。这种举动可能会在本就分歧严重的众议院中引发一场激烈的意识形态斗争，围绕共和党在削减开支方面的角色展开辩论，这可能导致政府面临部分关闭或约翰逊被免职。
source_text: However, with that deadline just 9 days away, Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell has said Congress will need to pass a CR to keep things open, meaning the speaker may soon break a promise he made, largely to appease his right flank. Such a maneuver could ignite a heated ideological battle in a closely divided House over the GOP's role in spending cuts that may see the government face a partial shutdown or Johnson removed from his job.
target_text: 然而，随着截止期限仅剩九天，参议院共和党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔表示，国会需要通过一项持续决议案以维持政府继续运作，这意味着众议院议长可能很快就会为了安抚右翼阵营而违反他所做的承诺。这种举动可能会在本就分歧严重的众议院中引发一场激烈的意识形态斗争，围绕共和党在削减开支方面的角色展开辩论，这可能导致政府面临部分关闭或约翰逊被免职。
reference_text: 然而，随着截止期限仅剩九天，参议院共和党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔表示，国会需要通过一项持续决议案以维持政府继续运作，这意味着众议院议长可能很快就会为了安抚右翼阵营而违反他所做的承诺。这种举动可能会在本就分歧严重的众议院中引发一场激烈的意识形态斗争，围绕共和党在削减开支方面的角色展开辩论，这可能导致政府面临部分关闭或约翰逊被免职。
hypo_1: 然而，距离这一最后期限仅剩9天，参议院共和党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔表示，国会需要通过一项继续决议（CR）以维持政府运作，这意味着这位议长可能很快就会打破他此前做出的承诺，而此前的承诺很大程度上是为了安抚他的右翼阵营。这种做法可能在分歧严重的众议院引发一场激烈的意识形态之争，围绕共和党在可能导致政府部分停摆或约翰逊被免职的削减开支问题上的角色展开。

source_sentences: "I've been very clear that CRs are not the way to fund our government that the Budget Act of 1974 calls for us to pass the 12 appropriation bills," Congressman Matt Rosendale of Montana told Newsweek. "We've had ample time to do that, and if the leadership does not direct the committees to get the work done and the members to be able to vote upon it, that therein lies the breakdown."

House Speaker Mike Johnson is pictured in the U.S. Capitol on December 12, 2023, in Washington, D.C. Johnson faces an unruly Republican conference that cannot reach an agreement on government spending levels. Photo by Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images
target_sentences: “我一直明确表示，1974年的《预算法案》要求我们通过12项拨款法案，持续决议案不是为政府提供资金的方式。”来自蒙大拿州的国会议员马特·罗森代尔在接受《新闻周刊》采访时表示，“我们本来有充足的时间来完成这件事，但如果领导层未指示委员会完成工作，成员们也无法就此进行表决，这就是问题的根源。”
美国众议院议长迈克·约翰逊于2023年12月12日在华盛顿特区的美国国会大厦的照片。约翰逊面临着一个难以驾驭的共和党党团，在政府开支水平上难以达成一致。凯文·迪奇摄/盖蒂图片社
source_text:
"I've been very clear that CRs are not the way to fund our government that the Budget Act of 1974 calls for us to pass the 12 appropriation bills," Congressman Matt Rosendale of Montana told Newsweek. "We've had ample time to do that, and if the leadership does not direct the committees to get the work done and the members to be able to vote upon it, that therein lies the breakdown."
House Speaker Mike Johnson is pictured in the U.S. Capitol on December 12, 2023, in Washington, D.C. Johnson faces an unruly Republican conference that cannot reach an agreement on government spending levels. Photo by Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images
target_text: “我一直明确表示，1974年的《预算法案》要求我们通过12项拨款法案，持续决议案不是为政府提供资金的方式。”来自蒙大拿州的国会议员马特·罗森代尔在接受《新闻周刊》采访时表示，“我们本来有充足的时间来完成这件事，但如果领导层未指示委员会完成工作，成员们也无法就此进行表决，这就是问题的根源。” 美国众议院议长迈克·约翰逊于2023年12月12日在华盛顿特区的美国国会大厦的照片。约翰逊面临着一个难以驾驭的共和党党团，在政府开支水平上难以达成一致。凯文·迪奇摄/盖蒂图片社
reference_text:
“我一直明确表示，1974年的《预算法案》要求我们通过12项拨款法案，持续决议案不是为政府提供资金的方式。”来自蒙大拿州的国会议员马特·罗森代尔在接受《新闻周刊》采访时表示，“我们本来有充足的时间来完成这件事，但如果领导层未指示委员会完成工作，成员们也无法就此进行表决，这就是问题的根源。”
美国众议院议长迈克·约翰逊于2023年12月12日在华盛顿特区的美国国会大厦的照片。约翰逊面临着一个难以驾驭的共和党党团，在政府开支水平上难以达成一致。凯文·迪奇摄/盖蒂图片社
hypo_1:
“我一直非常明确，补充拨款法案（CRs）并不是资助我们政府的方式，《1974年预算法》要求我们通过12项拨款法案。”蒙大拿州众议员马特·罗森代尔（Matt Rosendale）告诉《新闻周刊》。“我们已经有足够的时间去做这件事，如果领导层不指示各委员会完成相关工作，并让成员能够对此进行投票，那么问题就出在这里。”
2023年12月12日，众议院议长迈克·约翰逊在美国国会大厦华盛顿特区的照片。约翰逊面临一个难以就政府支出水平达成一致的混乱共和党会议。凯文·迪茨奇/盖蒂图片社拍摄

2023年12月12日，众议院议长迈克·约翰逊在美国国会大厦华盛顿特区的影像。约翰逊正面对一个无法在政府支出水平上达成一致的混乱共和党会议。凯文·迪茨奇/盖蒂图片社 摄

source_sentences: Rosendale, a member of the hard-right Freedom Caucus, was one of the individuals who derailed the Wednesday votes. He views the top line number in Johnson's deal as being too high and as doing too little to cut the $34 trillion national debt.

Rosendale was also among the 71 Republicans who opposed the Fiscal Responsibility Act struck between Democrats and former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, a deal that set the parameters for Johnson's recent negotiation with Senate Democratic Leader Charles Schumer.

Johnson celebrated his deal for cutting an estimated $16 billion in spending, but the Freedom Caucus believes he could have gotten more. Moderate Republicans who backed McCarthy's deal see that stance as unrealistic and running counter to the Republican goal of forcing Congress to pass the 12 individual spending bills as opposed to the "omnibus" measure of recent years, which combined those 12 bills into one vote.
target_sentences: 罗森代尔是极右翼自由党团的成员之一，也是阻碍周三表决的关键人物之一。他认为，约翰逊协议中的最高限额过高，在削减34万亿美元国债方面力度不足。
罗森代尔也是反对民主党与前议长凯文·麦卡锡达成的《财政责任法案》的71名共和党人之一，该法案为约翰逊最近与参议院民主党领袖查尔斯·舒默的谈判设定了框架。
约翰逊为其法案削减约160亿美元的支出而庆祝，但自由党团认为他本可以削减更多。支持麦卡锡方案的温和共和党人认为这一立场不切实际，并且与共和党的目标相悖，后者希望迫使国会通过12项单独的支出法案，而不是近年来将这12项法案合并为一项“综合法案”。
source_text:
Rosendale, a member of the hard-right Freedom Caucus, was one of the individuals who derailed the Wednesday votes. He views the top line number in Johnson's deal as being too high and as doing too little to cut the $34 trillion national debt.
Rosendale was also among the 71 Republicans who opposed the Fiscal Responsibility Act struck between Democrats and former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, a deal that set the parameters for Johnson's recent negotiation with Senate Democratic Leader Charles Schumer.
Johnson celebrated his deal for cutting an estimated $16 billion in spending, but the Freedom Caucus believes he could have gotten more. Moderate Republicans who backed McCarthy's deal see that stance as unrealistic and running counter to the Republican goal of forcing Congress to pass the 12 individual spending bills as opposed to the "omnibus" measure of recent years, which combined those 12 bills into one vote.

hypo_1:
罗森代尔是强硬派自由党团成员，是周三投票被阻挠的个人之一。他认为约翰逊协议中的赤字上限定得过高，削减34万亿美元国家债务的措施力度不够。
罗森代尔也是71名反对民主党与前议长凯文·麦卡锡达成的《财政责任法案》的共和党人之一，该协议为约翰逊最近与参议院民主党领袖查尔斯·舒默的谈判设定了框架。
约翰逊为削减约160亿美元支出的协议表示庆祝，但自由党团认为他本可以争取到更多。支持麦卡锡协议的温和派共和党人则认为这种立场不切实际，与共和党迫使国会通过12项单独拨款法案的目标背道而驰，而不是像近年来那样通过将这12项法案合并为一揽子法案进行表决。

source_sentences: "New year, same idiotic behavior by some," New York Republican Representative Mike Lawler told Newsweek. "We're not doing an omnibus, so each bill is going to have to be dealt with at conference and negotiated. Obviously, the reality is we're probably gonna need more time to do that. And I don't support a government shutdown, so I have no problem with doing a short-term CR that allows for this process to be completed."

Congress has not passed all 12 bills individually since 1996. Lawler said it's worth delaying passage of four of the bills to ensure the process is done right. If Congress cannot pass the 12 bills by December, under the Fiscal Responsibility Act, a 1 percent budget cut would be applied to defense and non-defense discretionary spending.
target_sentences: “新的一年，同样愚蠢的行为又出现了。”纽约州共和党众议员迈克·劳勒在接受《新闻周刊》采访时表示，“我们不会制定综合法案，因此每项法案都必须在会议上进行处理和谈判。显然，现实情况是我们可能需要更多时间来完成这项工作。我不支持政府停摆，所以我不反对通过短期的持续决议案来完成这个过程。”
自1996年以来，国会就未曾单独通过所有12项法案。劳勒表示，为了确保流程正确，推迟通过其中四项法案是值得的。如果国会不能在12月前通过这12项法案，根据《财政责任法案》，国防和非国防的自由裁量性开支将被削减1%。
source_text:
"New year, same idiotic behavior by some," New York Republican Representative Mike Lawler told Newsweek. "We're not doing an omnibus, so each bill is going to have to be dealt with at conference and negotiated. Obviously, the reality is we're probably gonna need more time to do that. And I don't support a government shutdown, so I have no problem with doing a short-term CR that allows for this process to be completed."
Congress has not passed all 12 bills individually since 1996. Lawler said it's worth delaying passage of four of the bills to ensure the process is done right. If Congress cannot pass the 12 bills by December, under the Fiscal Responsibility Act, a 1 percent budget cut would be applied to defense and non-defense discretionary spending.
target_text: “新的一年，同样愚蠢的行为又出现了。”纽约州共和党众议员迈克·劳勒在接受《新闻周刊》采访时表示，“我们不会制定综合法案，因此每项法案都必须在会议上进行处理和谈判。显然，现实情况是我们可能需要更多时间来完成这项工作。我不支持政府停摆，所以我不反对通过短期的持续决议案来完成这个过程。” 自1996年以来，国会就未曾单独通过所有12项法案。劳勒表示，为了确保流程正确，推迟通过其中四项法案是值得的。如果国会不能在12月前通过这12项法案，根据《财政责任法案》，国防和非国防的自由裁量性开支将被削减1%。

source_sentences: Congressman Thomas Massie of Kentucky, one of the Republican Party's most vocal budget hawks but not among those who protested the Wednesday vote, said a yearlong CR that triggers the 1 percent spending cut may be the most feasible way to keep the government open while ending ongoing "brinkmanship."

However, he said the most "responsible way" to cut spending would be to pass all 12 bills. With many Republicans reticent to see a shutdown and a 1 percent cut to defense spending, the urgency to pass the bills could see enough Republicans ally with Democrats to extend the deadline on the four spending bills and reach an agreement to fund the government, even if doing so puts Johnson in hot water with some of those on the hard right.
target_sentences: 肯塔基州众议员托马斯·马西是共和党内最直言不讳的预算鹰派之一，尽管他没有参与抗议周三的表决。他表示，通过一年期的持续决议案以触发1%的开支削减，可能是在结束持续“边缘政策”的同时保持政府运作的最可行方式。
不过，他表示，削减开支最“负责任的方式”是通过所有12项法案。由于许多共和党人不愿看到政府停摆以及国防开支削减1%，通过这些法案的迫切性可能会促使足够多的共和党人与民主党结盟，延长四项开支法案的最后期限，并达成一项为政府提供资金的协议，即使这样可能使约翰逊与一些强硬的右翼人士陷入困境。
source_text:
Congressman Thomas Massie of Kentucky, one of the Republican Party's most vocal budget hawks but not among those who protested the Wednesday vote, said a yearlong CR that triggers the 1 percent spending cut may be the most feasible way to keep the government open while ending ongoing "brinkmanship."
However, he said the most "responsible way" to cut spending would be to pass all 12 bills. With many Republicans reticent to see a shutdown and a 1 percent cut to defense spending, the urgency to pass the bills could see enough Republicans ally with Democrats to extend the deadline on the four spending bills and reach an agreement to fund the government, even if doing so puts Johnson in hot water with some of those on the hard right.
target_text: 肯塔基州众议员托马斯·马西是共和党内最直言不讳的预算鹰派之一，尽管他没有参与抗议周三的表决。他表示，通过一年期的持续决议案以触发1%的开支削减，可能是在结束持续“边缘政策”的同时保持政府运作的最可行方式。 不过，他表示，削减开支最“负责任的方式”是通过所有12项法案。由于许多共和党人不愿看到政府停摆以及国防开支削减1%，通过这些法案的迫切性可能会促使足够多的共和党人与民主党结盟，延长四项开支法案的最后期限，并达成一项为政府提供资金的协议，即使这样可能使约翰逊与一些强硬的右翼人士陷入困境。
reference_text:

不过，他表示，削减开支最“负责任的方式”是通过所有12项法案。由于许多共和党人不愿看到政府停摆以及国防开支削减1%，通过这些法案的迫切性可能会促使足够多的共和党人与民主党结盟，延长四项开支法案的最后期限，并达成一项为政府提供资金的协议，即使这样可能使约翰逊与一些强硬的右翼人士陷入困境。
hypo_1:
肯塔基州共和党众议员托马斯·马西是党内最直言不讳的预算鹰派之一，但他并未参与周三投票的抗议活动。他表示，一项为期一年的延续决议（CR）触发1%的支出削减，可能是维持政府运作并结束持续“边缘政策”的最可行方式。
然而，他表示，削减支出最“负责任的方式”是通过全部12项法案。由于许多共和党人不愿看到政府停摆和国防支出削减1%，通过这些法案的紧迫性可能会促使足够多的共和党人与民主党人结盟，延长四项支出法案的截止日期，并达成一项为政府提供资金的协议，即使这样做会让约翰逊与极右翼的一些人产生矛盾。

source_sentences: Regulators Approve New Bitcoin ETFs in Watershed Moment for Crypto

The Securities and Exchange Commission begrudgingly approved exchange-traded funds that directly hold bitcoin Wednesday, a move long-awaited by fans of digital currencies and criticized by financial watchdogs skeptical of the crypto industry.
The commission authorized 10 exchange-traded funds, or ETFs, that invest in bitcoin, including funds proposed by giants such as Blackrock and Fidelity as well as by smaller financial companies.

"While we approved the listing and trading of certain spot Bitcoin ETP shares today, we did not approve or endorse Bitcoin," SEC Chair Gary Gensler said in a statement. "Investors should remain cautious about the myriad risks associated with Bitcoin and products whose value is tied to crypto."
Gensler also added that the approval of the bitcoin funds did not imply the SEC would approve funds or exchange-traded products (ETPs) based on other digital currencies or assets.
target_sentences: 监管机构批准新的比特币ETF，加密货币迎来分水岭时刻
美国证监会 (SEC) 周三勉强批准了直接持有比特币的交易所交易基金 (ETF)。对此举期待已久的数字货币拥趸欢欣鼓舞，但对加密货币行业持怀疑态度的金融监管机构却对此提出了批评。
SEC 批准了 10 只投资比特币的 ETF，包括贝莱德、富达等巨头以及小型金融公司推出的基金。
“虽然我们今天批准了某些现货比特币 ETP（交易所交易产品）份额的上市和交易，但我们并未批准或认可比特币本身，”SEC 主席加里·詹斯勒在一份声明中表示，“投资者应谨慎对待与比特币及价值与其挂钩的产品相关的各种风险。”
詹斯勒还补充说，批准比特币基金并不意味着 SEC 会批准基于其他数字货币或资产的基金或 ETP。

The commission authorized 10 exchange-traded funds, or ETFs, that invest in bitcoin, including funds proposed by giants such as Blackrock and Fidelity as well as by smaller financial companies.
"While we approved the listing and trading of certain spot Bitcoin ETP shares today, we did not approve or endorse Bitcoin," SEC Chair Gary Gensler said in a statement. "Investors should remain cautious about the myriad risks associated with Bitcoin and products whose value is tied to crypto."
Gensler also added that the approval of the bitcoin funds did not imply the SEC would approve funds or exchange-traded products (ETPs) based on other digital currencies or assets.

reference_text:
监管机构批准新的比特币ETF，加密货币迎来分水岭时刻
美国证监会 (SEC) 周三勉强批准了直接持有比特币的交易所交易基金 (ETF)。对此举期待已久的数字货币拥趸欢欣鼓舞，但对加密货币行业持怀疑态度的金融监管机构却对此提出了批评。
SEC 批准了 10 只投资比特币的 ETF，包括贝莱德、富达等巨头以及小型金融公司推出的基金。
“虽然我们今天批准了某些现货比特币 ETP（交易所交易产品）份额的上市和交易，但我们并未批准或认可比特币本身，”SEC 主席加里·詹斯勒在一份声明中表示，“投资者应谨慎对待与比特币及价值与其挂钩的产品相关的各种风险。”
詹斯勒还补充说，批准比特币基金并不意味着 SEC 会批准基于其他数字货币或资产的基金或 ETP。
hypo_1:
监管机构批准新的比特币ETF，这是加密货币的重要里程碑
证券交易委员会周三勉强批准了直接持有比特币的交易所交易基金，这一举措是数字货币爱好者长期期待的，但也遭到了对加密货币行业持怀疑态度的金融监管机构的批评。
该委员会授权了10只投资于比特币的交易所交易基金（ETF），其中包括由贝莱德和富达等巨头以及一些小型金融机构提出的基金。
“尽管我们今天批准了某些比特币现货ETP股份的上市和交易，但我们并未批准或认可比特币，”证券交易委员会主席加里·詹斯勒在一份声明中表示。“投资者应继续对与比特币及其价值与加密货币挂钩的产品相关的各种风险保持谨慎。”
詹斯勒还补充说，批准比特币基金并不意味着证券交易委员会会批准基于其他数字货币或资产的基金或交易所交易产品（ETP）。

hypo_2_sentences: 监管机构批准新比特币ETF，标志着加密货币的重要转折点
美国证券交易委员会（SEC）周三勉强批准了直接持有比特币的交易所交易基金（ETF），这一举措是数字货币支持者长期期待的，但也遭到对加密货币行业持怀疑态度的金融监管机构的批评。
该委员会批准了10只投资于比特币的ETF，其中包括由贝莱德和富达等大型机构以及一些小型金融机构提出的基金。
“虽然我们今天批准了某些比特币现货ETP股份的上市和交易，但我们并未批准或认可比特币本身，”SEC主席加里·詹斯勒在声明中表示。“投资者应继续对与比特币及其价值与加密货币挂钩的产品相关的各种风险保持谨慎。”
詹斯勒还补充称，批准比特币基金并不意味着SEC会批准基于其他数字货币或资产的基金或交易所交易产品（ETP）。

source_sentences: "Importantly, today's Commission action is cabined to ETPs holding one non-security commodity, bitcoin. It should in no way signal the Commission's willingness to approve listing standards for crypto asset securities. Nor does the approval signal anything about the Commission's views as to the status of other crypto assets under the federal securities laws or about the current state of non-compliance of certain crypto asset market participants with the federal securities laws," Gensler said.

The SEC rejected applications for similar funds for years. Last year, however, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia ruled against the SEC's refusal to approve an application from Grayscale to convert a derivative fund into one that would directly bitcoin, calling the SEC's position "
target_sentences: “重要的是，证监会今天的行动仅限于持有单一非证券商品——比特币的 ETP。这绝不应被解读为证监会愿意批准加密资产证券上市标准的信号。此举也并不代表证监会对其他加密资产在联邦证券法下的地位，或某些加密资产市场参与者当前不遵守联邦证券法的情况有任何看法，”詹斯勒表示。
美国证监会多年来一直拒绝类似基金的申请。然而，去年美国哥伦比亚特区上诉法院裁定，美国证监会拒绝批准 Grayscale 将其衍生品基金转换为直接持有比特币的基金的决定是错误的。
source_text:
"Importantly, today's Commission action is cabined to ETPs holding one non-security commodity, bitcoin. It should in no way signal the Commission's willingness to approve listing standards for crypto asset securities. Nor does the approval signal anything about the Commission's views as to the status of other crypto assets under the federal securities laws or about the current state of non-compliance of certain crypto asset market participants with the federal securities laws," Gensler said.
The SEC rejected applications for similar funds for years. Last year, however, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia ruled against the SEC's refusal to approve an application from Grayscale to convert a derivative fund into one that would directly bitcoin, calling the SEC's position "
target_text: “重要的是，证监会今天的行动仅限于持有单一非证券商品——比特币的 ETP。这绝不应被解读为证监会愿意批准加密资产证券上市标准的信号。此举也并不代表证监会对其他加密资产在联邦证券法下的地位，或某些加密资产市场参与者当前不遵守联邦证券法的情况有任何看法，”詹斯勒表示。 美国证监会多年来一直拒绝类似基金的申请。然而，去年美国哥伦比亚特区上诉法院裁定，美国证监会拒绝批准 Grayscale 将其衍生品基金转换为直接持有比特币的基金的决定是错误的。
reference_text:
“重要的是，证监会今天的行动仅限于持有单一非证券商品——比特币的 ETP。这绝不应被解读为证监会愿意批准加密资产证券上市标准的信号。此举也并不代表证监会对其他加密资产在联邦证券法下的地位，或某些加密资产市场参与者当前不遵守联邦证券法的情况有任何看法，”詹斯勒表示。
美国证监会多年来一直拒绝类似基金的申请。然而，去年美国哥伦比亚特区上诉法院裁定，美国证监会拒绝批准 Grayscale 将其衍生品基金转换为直接持有比特币的基金的决定是错误的。
hypo_1:
“重要的是，今天委员会的行动仅限于持有单一非证券商品比特币的ETP。这绝不能被解读为委员会愿意批准加密资产证券的上市标准。批准本身也并不能说明委员会对其他加密资产在联邦证券法下的地位，或某些加密资产市场参与者目前违反联邦证券法的情况有何看法，”根斯勒表示。
美国证券交易委员会多年来拒绝了类似基金的申请。然而，去年，美国哥伦比亚特区上诉法院裁定反对证券交易委员会拒绝批准格雷瑟资本（Grayscale）将衍生基金转换为直接投资比特币的基金的申请，并称证券交易委员会的立场“

source_sentences: "Based on these circumstances and those discussed more fully in the approval order, I feel the most sustainable path forward is to approve the listing and trading of these spot bitcoin ETP shares," Gensler explained.

The much-anticipated approval has been hailed as a watershed event for digital currencies that proponents say will broaden access to investing in bitcoin and possibly lead to broader acceptance of cryptocurrencies as legitimate financial assets. The price of bitcoin has exploded higher in recent months, rising from around $25,000 in September to more than $45,000, in part because many bitcoin investors believe the ETFs will create more demand for the asset.
Critics blasted the SEC on Wednesday night.
target_sentences: “基于上述情况以及批准令中更全面讨论的那些情况，我认为最可持续的前进道路是批准这些现货比特币 ETP 份额的上市和交易，” 詹斯勒解释说。
这项备受期待的批准被誉为数字货币的分水岭事件。支持者表示，此举将扩大比特币投资渠道，并可能使加密货币作为合法金融资产被更广泛地接受。近几个月来，比特币价格飙升，从 9 月份的约 2.5 万美元上涨至超过 4.5 万美元，部分原因是许多比特币投资者认为，ETF 将创造更多对此类资产的需求。
周三晚间，批评人士纷纷对美国证监会进行抨击。
source_text:
"Based on these circumstances and those discussed more fully in the approval order, I feel the most sustainable path forward is to approve the listing and trading of these spot bitcoin ETP shares," Gensler explained.
The much-anticipated approval has been hailed as a watershed event for digital currencies that proponents say will broaden access to investing in bitcoin and possibly lead to broader acceptance of cryptocurrencies as legitimate financial assets. The price of bitcoin has exploded higher in recent months, rising from around $25,000 in September to more than $45,000, in part because many bitcoin investors believe the ETFs will create more demand for the asset.
Critics blasted the SEC on Wednesday night.
target_text: “基于上述情况以及批准令中更全面讨论的那些情况，我认为最可持续的前进道路是批准这些现货比特币 ETP 份额的上市和交易，” 詹斯勒解释说。 这项备受期待的批准被誉为数字货币的分水岭事件。支持者表示，此举将扩大比特币投资渠道，并可能使加密货币作为合法金融资产被更广泛地接受。近几个月来，比特币价格飙升，从 9 月份的约 2.5 万美元上涨至超过 4.5 万美元，部分原因是许多比特币投资者认为，ETF 将创造更多对此类资产的需求。 周三晚间，批评人士纷纷对美国证监会进行抨击。

这项备受期待的批准被誉为数字货币的分水岭事件。支持者表示，此举将扩大比特币投资渠道，并可能使加密货币作为合法金融资产被更广泛地接受。近几个月来，比特币价格飙升，从 9 月份的约 2.5 万美元上涨至超过 4.5 万美元，部分原因是许多比特币投资者认为，ETF 将创造更多对此类资产的需求。

hypo_1:
“基于这些情况以及在批准令中更详细讨论的内容，我认为最可持续的前进道路是批准这些实物比特币ETP股份的上市和交易，”詹斯勒解释道。
这一备受期待的批准被广泛誉为数字货币领域的一个转折点，支持者认为这将扩大人们投资比特币的渠道，并可能促使加密货币被更广泛地接受为合法的金融资产。最近几个月，比特币价格大幅上涨，从9月份的约25000美元上涨到超过45000美元，部分原因是许多比特币投资者相信ETF将为该资产创造更大的需求。
批评者在周三晚上抨击了证券交易委员会。

source_sentences: Dennis M. Kelleher, Co-founder, President, and CEO of Better Markets, said the approval is a "an historic mistake that will not only unleash crypto predators on tens of millions of investors and retirees but will also likely undermine financial stability."

"With the flagrantly lawless crypto industry crashing and burning due to a mountain of arrests, criminal convictions, bankruptcies, lawsuits, scandals, massive losses, and millions of investor and customer victims, who would have thought that the SEC would come to its rescue by approving a trusted and familiar investment vehicle that will enable the mass marketing of a known worthless, volatile, and fraud-filled financial product to Main Street Americans," Kelleher said.
target_sentences: Better Markets 联合创始人、总裁兼首席执行官丹尼斯·M·凯莱赫表示，这项批准是“一个历史性的错误，不仅会让数千万投资者和退休人员任由加密货币掠夺者宰割，还可能破坏金融稳定。”
“加密货币行业充斥着肆意妄为的违法行为，如今正因接踵而至的逮捕、刑事定罪、破产、诉讼、丑闻、巨额亏损而分崩离析，数百万投资者和客户沦为受害者。谁又能想到，美国证监会竟然会批准一种人们信赖且熟悉的投资工具来拯救这个行业，使这种已知的毫无价值、波动剧烈且充满欺诈的金融产品得以大规模推销给美国普通民众，”凯莱赫说道。
source_text:
Dennis M. Kelleher, Co-founder, President, and CEO of Better Markets, said the approval is a "an historic mistake that will not only unleash crypto predators on tens of millions of investors and retirees but will also likely undermine financial stability."
"With the flagrantly lawless crypto industry crashing and burning due to a mountain of arrests, criminal convictions, bankruptcies, lawsuits, scandals, massive losses, and millions of investor and customer victims, who would have thought that the SEC would come to its rescue by approving a trusted and familiar investment vehicle that will enable the mass marketing of a known worthless, volatile, and fraud-filled financial product to Main Street Americans," Kelleher said.
target_text: Better Markets 联合创始人、总裁兼首席执行官丹尼斯·M·凯莱赫表示，这项批准是“一个历史性的错误，不仅会让数千万投资者和退休人员任由加密货币掠夺者宰割，还可能破坏金融稳定。” “加密货币行业充斥着肆意妄为的违法行为，如今正因接踵而至的逮捕、刑事定罪、破产、诉讼、丑闻、巨额亏损而分崩离析，数百万投资者和客户沦为受害者。谁又能想到，美国证监会竟然会批准一种人们信赖且熟悉的投资工具来拯救这个行业，使这种已知的毫无价值、波动剧烈且充满欺诈的金融产品得以大规模推销给美国普通民众，”凯莱赫说道。
reference_text:
Better Markets 联合创始人、总裁兼首席执行官丹尼斯·M·凯莱赫表示，这项批准是“一个历史性的错误，不仅会让数千万投资者和退休人员任由加密货币掠夺者宰割，还可能破坏金融稳定。”
“加密货币行业充斥着肆意妄为的违法行为，如今正因接踵而至的逮捕、刑事定罪、破产、诉讼、丑闻、巨额亏损而分崩离析，数百万投资者和客户沦为受害者。谁又能想到，美国证监会竟然会批准一种人们信赖且熟悉的投资工具来拯救这个行业，使这种已知的毫无价值、波动剧烈且充满欺诈的金融产品得以大规模推销给美国普通民众，”凯莱赫说道。
hypo_1:
贝特市场公司（Better Markets）联合创始人、总裁兼首席执行官丹尼斯·M·凯勒（Dennis M. Kelleher）表示，这一批准是“一项历史性错误，不仅会释放出数千万投资者和退休人员面临的加密货币掠食者，还可能危及金融稳定。”
凯勒表示：“在加密货币行业因大量逮捕、刑事定罪、破产、诉讼、丑闻、巨额损失以及数百万投资者和客户受害者而陷入崩溃和燃烧的明显违法情况下，谁会想到证券交易委员会（SEC）竟然会通过一种值得信赖且熟悉的投资工具来解救它，从而使得一种众所周知的毫无价值、波动剧烈且充满欺诈的金融产品能够大规模地向美国普通民众进行营销。”

source_sentences: Complaints of Russian language use in Ukraine rise 30% - RT Russia & Former Soviet Union
Authorities are urging the population to file reports in a bid to de-Russify the country

The number of complaints to authorities in Ukraine of a person speaking in Russian increased by 30% last year. Kiev actively encourages the population to report such cases in a bid to allegedly 'protect' the country from Russian influence.

According to the office of the commissioner for the protection of the state language, 3,692 language law violations were reported in 2023. Kiev, Kharkov, and Odessa remain "leaders in terms of the number of complaints of violations. Therefore, strict controls over the observance of the language rights of citizens in all spheres of public life should be among the priorities of community leaders this year," Taras Kremen, the country's Language Ombudsman said.
target_sentences: 乌克兰境内关于使用俄语的投诉上升 30%
政府当局敦促民众积极举报，以加速去俄罗斯化进程。
去年，乌克兰当局收到的关于使用俄语的投诉数量增加了 30%。基辅积极鼓励民众举报此类案件，据称是为了“保护”国家免受俄罗斯的影响。
据乌克兰国家语言保护专员办公室的数据显示，2023 年共报告了 3692 起违反语言法的案件。乌克兰语言监察专员塔拉斯·克雷门表示，基辅、哈尔科夫和敖德萨仍然是“违规投诉数量最多的地区。因此，严格监督公共生活各个领域公民语言权利的遵守情况，应当成为社区领头人今年的首要任务之一。”
source_text:
Complaints of Russian language use in Ukraine rise 30% - RT Russia & Former Soviet Union
Authorities are urging the population to file reports in a bid to de-Russify the country
The number of complaints to authorities in Ukraine of a person speaking in Russian increased by 30% last year. Kiev actively encourages the population to report such cases in a bid to allegedly 'protect' the country from Russian influence.
According to the office of the commissioner for the protection of the state language, 3,692 language law violations were reported in 2023. Kiev, Kharkov, and Odessa remain "leaders in terms of the number of complaints of violations. Therefore, strict controls over the observance of the language rights of citizens in all spheres of public life should be among the priorities of community leaders this year," Taras Kremen, the country's Language Ombudsman said.
target_text: 乌克兰境内关于使用俄语的投诉上升 30% 政府当局敦促民众积极举报，以加速去俄罗斯化进程。 去年，乌克兰当局收到的关于使用俄语的投诉数量增加了 30%。基辅积极鼓励民众举报此类案件，据称是为了“保护”国家免受俄罗斯的影响。 据乌克兰国家语言保护专员办公室的数据显示，2023 年共报告了 3692 起违反语言法的案件。乌克兰语言监察专员塔拉斯·克雷门表示，基辅、哈尔科夫和敖德萨仍然是“违规投诉数量最多的地区。因此，严格监督公共生活各个领域公民语言权利的遵守情况，应当成为社区领头人今年的首要任务之一。”
reference_text:
乌克兰境内关于使用俄语的投诉上升 30%
政府当局敦促民众积极举报，以加速去俄罗斯化进程。
去年，乌克兰当局收到的关于使用俄语的投诉数量增加了 30%。基辅积极鼓励民众举报此类案件，据称是为了“保护”国家免受俄罗斯的影响。
据乌克兰国家语言保护专员办公室的数据显示，2023 年共报告了 3692 起违反语言法的案件。乌克兰语言监察专员塔拉斯·克雷门表示，基辅、哈尔科夫和敖德萨仍然是“违规投诉数量最多的地区。因此，严格监督公共生活各个领域公民语言权利的遵守情况，应当成为社区领头人今年的首要任务之一。”
hypo_1:
乌克兰俄语使用投诉增加30% - RT 俄罗斯及前苏联地区
当局敦促民众提交报告，试图去俄罗斯化
去年，乌克兰向当局投诉某人使用俄语的案件增加了30%。基辅积极鼓励民众举报此类案件，据称是为了“保护”国家免受俄罗斯影响。
根据国家语言保护专员办公室的数据，2023年报告了3,692起语言法违规事件。基辅、哈尔科夫和敖德萨仍然是“违规投诉数量的领先地区”。因此，国家语言监察员塔拉斯·克雷门表示，今年社区领导者的优先事项之一应是在所有公共生活领域严格监督公民语言权利的遵守情况。

根据国家语言保护专员办公室的数据，2023年共报告了3,692起违反语言法的事件。基辅、哈尔科夫和敖德萨仍是“投诉数量最多的地区”。因此，国家语言监察员塔拉斯·克雷门表示，今年社区领导者的优先任务之一，应是在所有公共生活领域严格监督公民语言权利的执行情况。

source_sentences: Kremen also confirmed that a 3,400 hryvnia ($89) fine had been imposed on a Kiev taxi driver who serviced his clients in Russian. The ombudsman reminded the public of a "detailed algorithm of actions in case of violation of the right to receive information or services in the state language," urging people to immediately file complaints on the commissioner's website when such cases occur.
target_sentences: 克雷门还证实，基辅一名出租车司机因使用俄语为客户提供服务而被处以 3400 格里夫纳（89 美元）的罚款。这位语言监察专员提醒公众注意“在获取信息或服务的权利受到侵犯时的详细行动步骤”，并敦促人们在此类情况发生时立即在专员网站上提出投诉。
source_text: Kremen also confirmed that a 3,400 hryvnia ($89) fine had been imposed on a Kiev taxi driver who serviced his clients in Russian. source_sentences: In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.

Last August, a teenage signer was briefly detained and forced to record a video apology following a performance of Soviet singer Viktor Tsoy's songs on the street in the city of Lviv. The dismissal of several teachers who spoke Russian to their students also resulted in a public outcry.
target_sentences: 2019 年，乌克兰通过了一项法律，规定在政府、医疗、科学、教育和媒体等所有公共生活领域必须使用乌克兰语，违者将被处以罚款。自 2022 年与俄罗斯爆发军事冲突以来，乌克兰开展了全面去俄罗斯化运动。议员们表示，为了抵御俄罗斯的影响，这些措施是必要的。地方当局全面禁止俄语艺术作品、表演、书籍、电影、歌曲以及在中小学和大学学习俄语，甚至建议学生在课间休息时也使用乌克兰语交流。
去年 8 月，一名十几岁的歌手在利沃夫市街头演唱苏联歌手维克托·崔的歌曲后被短暂拘留，并被迫录制道歉视频。另有多名教师因对学生说俄语而被解雇，也引发了公众的强烈抗议。
source_text:
In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.
Last August, a teenage signer was briefly detained and forced to record a video apology following a performance of Soviet singer Viktor Tsoy's songs on the street in the city of Lviv. The dismissal of several teachers who spoke Russian to their students also resulted in a public outcry.
target_text: 2019 年，乌克兰通过了一项法律，规定在政府、医疗、科学、教育和媒体等所有公共生活领域必须使用乌克兰语，违者将被处以罚款。自 2022 年与俄罗斯爆发军事冲突以来，乌克兰开展了全面去俄罗斯化运动。议员们表示，为了抵御俄罗斯的影响，这些措施是必要的。地方当局全面禁止俄语艺术作品、表演、书籍、电影、歌曲以及在中小学和大学学习俄语，甚至建议学生在课间休息时也使用乌克兰语交流。 去年 8 月，一名十几岁的歌手在利沃夫市街头演唱苏联歌手维克托·崔的歌曲后被短暂拘留，并被迫录制道歉视频。另有多名教师因对学生说俄语而被解雇，也引发了公众的强烈抗议。
reference_text:
2019 年，乌克兰通过了一项法律，规定在政府、医疗、科学、教育和媒体等所有公共生活领域必须使用乌克兰语，违者将被处以罚款。自 2022 年与俄罗斯爆发军事冲突以来，乌克兰开展了全面去俄罗斯化运动。议员们表示，为了抵御俄罗斯的影响，这些措施是必要的。地方当局全面禁止俄语艺术作品、表演、书籍、电影、歌曲以及在中小学和大学学习俄语，甚至建议学生在课间休息时也使用乌克兰语交流。
去年 8 月，一名十几岁的歌手在利沃夫市街头演唱苏联歌手维克托·崔的歌曲后被短暂拘留，并被迫录制道歉视频。另有多名教师因对学生说俄语而被解雇，也引发了公众的强烈抗议。
hypo_1:
2019年，乌克兰通过了一项法律，规定在所有公共生活领域，包括政府、医疗、科学、教育和媒体中，必须强制使用乌克兰语。违反规定可能会被罚款。自2022年与俄罗斯的军事冲突开始以来，乌克兰开展了一场全面去俄罗斯化的运动，议员们表示这是为了抵御俄罗斯影响所必需的。地方当局已全面禁止俄罗斯语的艺术作品、演出、书籍、电影、歌曲及其在学校和大学中的学习，并建议学生即使在课间休息时也要用乌克兰语交流。
去年八月，一名青少年歌手在利沃夫市街头表演前苏联歌手维克多·崔的歌曲后，被短暂拘留并被迫录制了一段道歉视频。此外，几名教师因用俄语与学生交流而被解雇，也引发了公众的强烈抗议。

source_sentences: The Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of Ukraine, Alexey Danilov, has previously said "the Russian language must disappear" from the territory of Ukraine "as an element of hostile propaganda and brainwashing of the population."

Moscow maintains that such laws violate the rights of Russian-speaking people, who make up around half of Ukraine's population. Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said in February that Kiev's "discriminatory campaign" against the language was growing more and more "indignant." In a survey conducted last September by the Kiev International Institute of Sociology, respondents cited language discrimination as the most common type of prejudice in Ukraine, with 45% saying it was a problem.
target_sentences: 乌克兰国家安全和国防委员会秘书阿列克谢·丹尼洛夫此前曾表示，“俄语必须从乌克兰领土上消失，因为它是敌对宣传和洗脑民众的工具”。
莫斯科方面认为，此类法律侵犯了俄语使用者的权利，而俄语使用者约占乌克兰人口的一半。俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃在 2 月表示，基辅当局针对俄语的“歧视性运动”愈演愈烈，令人愤慨。基辅国际社会学研究所去年 9 月进行的一项调查显示，受访者认为语言歧视是乌克兰最常见的偏见，45% 的受访者认为这是一个问题。
source_text:
The Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of Ukraine, Alexey Danilov, has previously said "the Russian language must disappear" from the territory of Ukraine "as an element of hostile propaganda and brainwashing of the population."
Moscow maintains that such laws violate the rights of Russian-speaking people, who make up around half of Ukraine's population. Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said in February that Kiev's "discriminatory campaign" against the language was growing more and more "indignant." In a survey conducted last September by the Kiev International Institute of Sociology, respondents cited language discrimination as the most common type of prejudice in Ukraine, with 45% saying it was a problem.
target_text: 乌克兰国家安全和国防委员会秘书阿列克谢·丹尼洛夫此前曾表示，“俄语必须从乌克兰领土上消失，因为它是敌对宣传和洗脑民众的工具”。 莫斯科方面认为，此类法律侵犯了俄语使用者的权利，而俄语使用者约占乌克兰人口的一半。俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃在 2 月表示，基辅当局针对俄语的“歧视性运动”愈演愈烈，令人愤慨。基辅国际社会学研究所去年 9 月进行的一项调查显示，受访者认为语言歧视是乌克兰最常见的偏见，45% 的受访者认为这是一个问题。

乌克兰国家安全与国防委员会秘书阿列克谢·达尼洛夫此前表示：“俄语必须从乌克兰领土上消失，作为敌对宣传和民众洗脑的工具。”
莫斯科方面认为，此类法律侵犯了俄语人口的权利，这些人约占乌克兰人口的一半。俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃2月份表示，基辅针对俄语的“歧视性运动”变得越来越“令人愤慨”。 基辅国际社会学研究所去年9月进行的一项调查显示，受访者将语言歧视视为乌克兰最常见的偏见类型，45%的人表示这是一个问题。
